title: AI Video Specialist
description:
Background

We’re a fast-growing social media agency producing high-performing short-form content across Instagram,
, YouTube, and more.



We’re looking for a full-time AI Video Specialist to create AI-generated clips and turn them into polished, high-retention videos using our internal workflows.



This is an execution-focused role, not strategy.



You’ll be working from clear briefs, proven systems, and step-by-step SOPs for every task.



If you haven’t used every tool in our stack yet, that’s completely fine. We’ll train the right person.



What You’ll Do

- Video Editing

- Turn raw footage into engaging short-form content (Reels, Shorts)

- Add captions, overlays, transitions, sound design, and B-roll using CapCut

- Follow brand guidelines and client briefs with precision

- Incorporate feedback quickly and accurately

- Deliver consistent daily output, on time

- Maintain consistency across multiple client accounts



AI Clip Generation

- Create AI video assets using tools like Veo3 and HeyGen

- Execute SOPs exactly (prompts, settings, and formats are predefined)

- Review all outputs for quality (accuracy, artifacts, exports) before submission

- Flag issues and suggest improvements to workflows

- Keep all assets organized and clearly labeled for handoff



General

- Manage multiple client projects without missing deadlines

- Maintain clean, structured file systems

- Communicate proactively about progress, timelines, and blockers



Requirements

- Must-Haves

- Proven experience editing short-form content (portfolio required)

- Strong English communication skills (written and spoken)

- Solid proficiency in CapCut

- Start your application with the word “hook” so we know you’ve read the full job description

- Comfortable following structured SOPs (execute first, refine second)

- High attention to detail and quality

- Ability to manage multiple projects at once

- Reliable internet and a dedicated workspace

- Minimum 2 hours of timezone overlap with the team (based in the US & Canada)

- Coachable, adaptable, and quick to learn new tools



Nice-to-Haves

- Experience with AI video tools (Veo3, HeyGen, etc.)

- Background in an agency or content production environment

- Understanding of short-form performance (hooks, pacing, retention)

- Familiarity with CapCut, Premiere Pro, or similar tools

- Access to a VPN with a dedicated IP



What We Offer

- Stable, full-time remote role with consistent workload

- Clear systems and SOPs — no guesswork

- Training on AI tools for the right candidate

- Direct communication and fast feedback

- Growth opportunities as we scale

- Performance bonuses (up to 50% of monthly pay, dependent on performance)

- Access to all required tools



How to Apply:



Include all of the following. Incomplete applications will not be reviewed:

- Portfolio or reel (Drive, Notion, or direct links)

- 2–3 talking head edits

- AI-generated video samples (if available)

- Short answer (3–5 sentences): What do you do when an SOP is unclear?

- Your timezone + working hours



No portfolio = no review.

title: GHL Specialist with Great Marketing Background
description:
We’re looking for a Go HighLevel specialist who doesn’t just “build” — but actually understands marketing.. Experience working with coaches is PLUS POINT.



This role is for someone who can step into an account, assess what’s working (and what’s not), and give clear, practical recommendations that improve results.



If you’re someone who sees beyond automations and pipelines — and thinks in terms of lead flow, conversions, and client outcomes — keep reading.



What You’ll Be Doing



Audit existing Go HighLevel setups (funnels, workflows, pipelines, CRM structure)

Identify gaps, inefficiencies, and missed opportunities

Provide clear recommendations backed by marketing logic

Implement improvements across funnels, automations, and campaigns

Work on
/SMS sequences with conversion in mind

Support landing page and funnel builds when needed

Collaborate with our team on campaign strategy and execution



What We’re Looking For



Strong experience with Go HighLevel (this is non-negotiable)

Able to confidently audit an account and explain findings clearly

Solid understanding of marketing fundamentals (lead generation, nurturing, conversions)

Knows what makes a funnel or campaign actually perform — not just function

Detail-oriented but also able to see the bigger picture

Proactive — you don’t wait to be told what’s broken



Bonus Points If You Have



Experience working with Australian businesses

Background in agencies or client-facing roles

Copywriting or funnel strategy experience

Familiarity with paid ads and how they connect to GHL workflows



Role Details



Part-time role (with room to grow into full-time)

Rate: $8–$11 AUD per hour (based on experience)

Start: ASAP

Remote



How to Apply



Send us:

A short intro about your experience with Go HighLevel

A sample audit (or walkthrough) of a GHL account you’ve worked on

What you typically look for when reviewing a funnel or automation

Attach an updated CV

title: Sales Admin Support
description:
ROLE OVERVIEW



Fintonia Group is seeking a Senior Sales Admin & AI Operations Support professional to serve as the operational backbone of its sales and client engagement functions. This is not a conventional administrative role: the individual will be responsible for maintaining rigorous sales operations while independently building and managing AI-powered workflows that enhance team productivity, client responsiveness, and process quality. A non-negotiable attribute for this role is an exceptional standard of accuracy — the work product this person owns directly reflects on the firm's credibility with clients and counterparties.



The successful candidate will bring a combination of structured administrative discipline and a strong command of modern AI automation tools. Reporting directly to the Head of Sales, this person will work across sales, compliance, and operations to ensure that client onboarding and engagement workflows operate to institutional standards.



At a firm that sits at the intersection of traditional finance and digital assets, the ability to translate operational complexity into streamlined, technology-enabled processes will be a direct contribution to commercial outcomes.



Key Responsibilities:

Client Onboarding & Documentation

Own the full client onboarding lifecycle — from intake through KYC/AML documentation, compliance review, and account activation — ensuring every file is complete, accurate, and audit-ready before submission.

Prepare and coordinate all onboarding documentation including subscription agreements, client questionnaires, and regulatory forms, working closely with the compliance and operations teams to meet applicable standards.

Proactively track onboarding status for all active clients, following up on outstanding items and escalating blockers to avoid delays in the activation timeline.

Maintain a structured, version-controlled onboarding repository that can withstand internal or regulatory audit at any point.



Client Relationship Support

Serve as the first point of contact for client enquiries, providing timely, professional responses and managing expectations on resolution timelines.

Coordinate all client-facing logistics — meetings, product demonstrations, webinars, and review calls — ensuring preparation materials, agendas, and follow-up notes are managed without requiring senior tea
mbers to chase.

Maintain accurate, current client records in the CRM; flag data anomalies, contact changes, or missing information proactively rather than reactively.

Support the relationship management team in preparing client update materials, periodic reports, and tailored communications.



Sales & Administrative Support

Support the sales team with scheduling, calendar management, CRM maintenance, and preparation of pitch materials and proposals.

Maintain internal trackers and action logs for client interactions, onboarding milestones, and sales pipeline activity.

Identify and flag opportunities to streamline administrative workflows using available technology tools.



Requirements:

3–5 years of experience in client onboarding, client servicing, or relationship support within financial services, fintech, or asset management

Hands-on experience managing KYC/AML documentation and compliance-driven onboarding processes end-to-end — not just assisting

Strong proficiency in CRM systems (e.g. Salesforce, HubSpot) and Microsoft Office / Google Workspace

Excellent written English communication skills; able to draft professional client-facing correspondence independently and accurately

Structured, detail-oriented approach to documentation management with a track record of maintaining audit-ready files

Demonstrated ability to manage multiple concurrent client onboarding workflows without supervision

Comfortable working remotely and independently, aligned to Singapore / KL business hours (SGT/MYT)

Bachelor's degree in Business Administration, Finance, Economics, or a related field



Location: Remote (Philippines-based)

Work Hours: Aligned with Singapore Time Zone (SGT), Monday to Friday



Please apply through this link -

ONLY applicants who upload CV via the link will be considered. Thanks!

description:

You DON'T need to do ALL tasks — if you can handle 2 out of 4, you're still worth talking to.



WHAT WE NEED HELP WITH:

1. Product Research for TikTok Shop Creators — Finding winning products, trends, and affiliate opportunities

2. AI-Assisted Content Creation — Using AI tools to create videos, captions, and posts

3. TikTok Account Seasoning & Growth — Managing and warming up TikTok accounts, building traction

4. Social Media Engagement & Content Ideas — Engaging with other accounts, sourcing ideas that convert



REQUIREMENTS (at least ONE):

- Worked with TikTok Shop creators or affiliates

- Created content for TikTok or Instagram

- Seasoned or grown TikTok / IG accounts

- Researched viral content to replicate for views

- Basic video editing

title: Brand & Content Designer (Remote, Full-Time)
description:
Job description



At Miraco Nutripharm, we are dedicated to advancing health and improving lives. Our goal is to relieve 1 billion people worldwide of pain and discomfort. If you know of anyone who has been worried about or suffered from any health problems, join us in making a positive impact by reducing the pain and distress others have to endure.



We’re seeking a full-time Brand and Content Designer to lead the creative direction of our brand across packaging, offline marketing, and digital platforms. This role is ideal for a strategic, hands-on creative who can own both design and content production, from ideation to execution, while supporting our expansion across Southeast Asia and global markets.



As a key member of the team, you'll be responsible for producing compelling visuals and content that reflect the heart of our brand and connect meaningfully with consumers, healthcare professionals, and distribution partners.



Key Responsibilities:



-Brand Development & Creative Direction-

*Lead development of visual identity for new and existing brands, including logos, packaging, brand guidelines, typography and brand story

*Propose and implement creative directions from Pantone color palettes to iconography, font systems and photography guidelines

*Establish and maintain consistent branding across all physical and digital touchpoints, while ensuring all brand assets are stored and updated in an organized, easily accessible database



-Graphic & Marketing Design-

*Design high-impact materials such as product packaging, brochures, point-of-sale displays, in-store visuals and Continuing Medical Education (CME) event collaterals

*Develop pitch decks, sales presentations and brand kits for internal and external stakeholders

*Create visuals for promotions, campaigns, and trade shows for greater awareness and conversion



-Content Creation & Copywriting-

*Collaborate with the team to develop content ideas and messaging for various platforms (digital ads, social media, web,
)

*Write and edit marketing copy as needed, including taglines, brand messaging, product descriptions, and promotional materials

*Contribute to storytelling, campaign ideation, consumer education initiatives, and customer loyalty initiatives



-Digital & Multimedia Content-

*Produce digital assets for ecommerce platforms, social media ads, newsletters, and display ads (Google Ads Meta, TikTok)

*Edit videos and animations for campaigns, tutorials, events, and educational content using tools like CapCut, Premiere Pro, or After Effects

*Repurpose content across multiple formats and languages when applicable



-Cross-Functional Collaboration-

*Work closely with marketing, sales, pharmacists and leadership to turn strategic goals into compelling creative output

*Participate in product launch discussions and brand development brainstorming sessions

*Coordinate with external freelancers or vendors as needed



-Regional Support & Market Expansion-

*Adapt assets for regional markets including Singapore, Malaysia, Mainland China & Hong Kong and future expansion areas

*Ensure consistency across regions while accounting for local cultural, language, market and regulatory differences



-Requirements-

*Minimum 3–5 years of experience in graphic design, brand development, content creation, or multimedia production

*Strong portfolio showcasing design, branding, and content/copywriting capabilities across print and digital

*Proficient in Adobe Creative Suite (Illustrator, Photoshop, Premiere Pro), CapCut, Canva, Figma, or similar tools

*Excellent understanding of branding, packaging, digital marketing, and customer communication

*Creative thinker with strong attention to detail and an eye for aesthetic balance

*Highly organized, self-driven, and able to manage multiple timelines in a fast-paced environment

*Strong communication and collaboration skills, especially in remote work settings

*Experience in the health, wellness, pharmaceutical, or consumer goods sector is a plus

*Degree in Design, Marketing, Communications, or a related field preferred but not mandatory



Kindly submit your updated CV and sample portfolio to 
 for our review.

title: Creative Strategist & Content Producer
description:
About the company

At Miraco Nutripharm, we are dedicated to advancing health & improving lives. Our goal is to relieve 1 billion people worldwide of pain & discomfort. If you know of anyone who has been worried about or suffered from any health problems, join us in making a positive impact by reducing the pain & distress others have to endure.

Job description

We're looking for a Creative Strategist & Content Producer to shape how our health & pharmaceutical brands communicate across both digital & offline channels. You'll craft effective strategies that translate scientific credibility into compelling storytelling & creative assets - helping us engage our diverse audience as we expand our presence regionally. 



The Creative Strategist & Content Producer will be the visionary link between our brand identity, compelling content creation & drive measurable performance across all key channels. This role is responsible for developing & testing high-impact creative strategies as well as producing content assets (visual, video, copy) internally, specifically designed to drive traffic, increase conversion rates, lower Customer Acquisition Cost (CAC) & drive overall revenue growth for our Shopify, Shopee & Lazada stores via social media as well as paid advertising platforms.



You'll work across multiple channels & markets to plan, create & optimize content that builds awareness, strengthens partnerships & supports the new channels of the business. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys balancing creativity, analytics & brand strategy in the health supplement industry. 



Key Responsibilities:

Creative Strategy

- Platform & Channel Strategy: Craft tailored creative strategies for B2C & B2B audiences optimized for platform-specific best practices & formats that align with brand goals & regulatory requirements in each market (e.g., Meta carousel ads, vertical video for TikTok/Reels, static product carousels for Shopee/Lazada e-commerce banner ads).

- Hypothesis Generation & A/B Testing: Develop robust creative testing matrices, formulate clear hypotheses for creative elements (hooks, calls-to-action, visual styles, copy length) that drive measurable improvements in Click-Through Rate (CTR) & Conversion Rate (CVR).

- Audience Segmentation: Translate target audience data & segmentation provided by media buyers into resonant creative themes, ensuring content speaks directly to different stages of the marketing funnel (awareness, consideration, conversion).

- Competitive Analysis: Continuously keep up to date with competitors & industry trends, identifying new & successful creative formats, hooks & messaging to finetune our strategy.

In-House Content Production & Execution 

- Performance Creative Development: Lead the end-to-end creative concept development & production for all organic & paid media campaigns (Meta, TikTok, Google/YouTube, etc.) that align with brand & campaign goals, focusing on high-volume, quick-turnaround testing required for performance marketing.

- Hands-on Asset Creation: Directly produce & edit native social content & performance ads using existing assets, stock libraries & internal resources. This includes:

i. Plan platform-specific content calendars: Cover educational, promotional & corporate communications

ii. Static/Image Editing: Adapt product photography, create ad variations & design simple graphics & banner ads

iii. Video Editing: Fast-paced assembly, cutting, adding text overlays, music & effects for short-form, vertical video (UGC-style, product demos, testimonials)

- Copywriting: Develop high-converting ad copy, landing page headlines & social media captions that align with the creative strategy & brand voice, with a focus on clear value propositions & strong CTAs.

- Asset Management: Ensure all campaign assets are correctly tagged, archived & deployed across relevant channels (Shopify, Shopee, Lazada store fronts & advertising platforms).

- Testing & Optimization: apply insights & analytics to refine & optimize content effectiveness across platforms.

Performance & Reporting

- Data-Driven Insights: Work closely with the Marketing Manager to analyze creative performance reports, identifying which creative variables are driving results (or failing) across Shopify, Shopee & Lazada traffic.

- Iteration & Optimization: 

i. Develop, adapt or review content & formats to improve engagement & performance

ii. Use performance data (ROAS, CPA, CTR, CVR) to rapidly iterate on existing creative assets & inform future strategy, ensuring a continuous cycle of improvement & optimization

Storefront Integration: Integrate winning creative messages & visuals onto the respective e-commerce storefronts (product pages, banners) to ensure a cohesive customer journey.

Multi-Channel Storytelling

- Content cohesion: Ensure content is aligned where possible across digital & print media, including LinkedIn, Instagram,
, YouTube, e-commerce platforms, brochures & trade materials.

- Tailor content: To achieve relevance & effectiveness across different stages of the audience journey — from brand awareness & education to conversion.

- Storytelling & visual consistency: To strengthen brand trust & recognition.

Compliance & Brand Integrity

- Uphold regulatory & ethical communication standards across all marketing activities.

- Ensure all content complies with regulatory guidelines & marketing requirements in each country we operate in, including product claims, advertising language & digital promotions.

- Maintain brand credibility by ensuring all communications are factual & aligned with company values.

- Collaborate with internal teams to review materials for accuracy, effectiveness & compliance before publication.



Requirements:

- 3–5 years of experience in creative strategy, content creation, social media, or brand marketing — ideally in health supplements, healthcare or wellness.

- Strong understanding of social media trends & platform best practices (Meta (FB/IG), LinkedIn, TikTok, YouTube, Google, Generative AI).

- Proficient in Adobe Creative Suite (Illustrator, Photoshop, Premiere Pro), CapCut, Canva, Figma, or similar tools.

- Excellent writing, editing & visual storytelling skills — adopt a strategic approach to design that integrates marketing & commercial goals.

- Excellent communication, project management & cross-functional collaboration skills.

- Familiarity with regulatory communication standards or track record in health supplements or healthcare industry is a plus.



Please send your applications to

title: Wills & Estates Specialist Lawyer (Branch Lead)
description:
About the Role

We are seeking an experienced Wills & Estates Lawyer to take full ownership of building and running our Wills & Estates (W&E) division. This is not just a legal drafting role—you will be responsible for establishing, managing, and scaling an entire practice area from end to end.



You will serve as the driving force behind this branch, ensuring high-quality client outcomes while building efficient systems and processes that support long-term growth.



Your Impact in This Role

As our Wills & Estates Specialist, your work will directly shape a new revenue stream and strengthen client trust in our firm. You will:

- Build and lead the W&E division from the ground up, creating structure, workflows, and best practices

- Deliver end-to-end estate planning services, including drafting wills, powers of attorney, and related legal documents

- Ensure exceptional client experience, guiding clients through sensitive life decisions with clarity and care

- Drive revenue and growth by developing scalable systems and identifying opportunities within the W&E space

- Maintain compliance and legal excellence, ensuring all documents and processes meet current legal standards

- Act as a trusted advisor, helping clients protect their assets and plan for the future with confidence

- Collaborate with leadership to align the W&E branch with overall business strategy



What You Bring & the Value You Add

You are more than a lawyer—you are a builder, operator, and strategic thinker who can turn a service into a thriving business unit.

- Proven experience in Wills & Estates law, including drafting wills and estate planning documents

- Strong understanding of end-to-end estate planning processes

- Ability to work autonomously and take full ownership of a practice area

- Experience in building or improving legal systems and workflows (highly valued)

- Excellent client communication and relationship management skills, especially in sensitive situations

- Commercial mindset with the ability to identify growth opportunities and improve efficiency

- High attention to detail with a commitment to accuracy and compliance



Why This Role Matters

This role is critical to expanding our service offering and deepening the value we provide to clients. By building a strong Wills & Estates division, you will:

- Create a sustainable and scalable business line

- Help clients make life-defining decisions with confidence and security

- Establish systems that enable long-term operational efficiency and growth

- Position yourself as a key leader within the firm, with real influence over direction and outcomes

title: DM Setter & Fitness Coaching Virtual Assistant
description:
About The Role

We’re scaling a premium online fitness coaching business and need a reliable VA to handle two core tasks: managing DM responses to sales leads and entering client programs into our coaching platform.

You will not be managing our social media or creating content. You will be responding to incoming DM inquiries, preparing leads for calls, and accurately inputting client programs into our system.

Your Responsibilities

One: When a prospective client DMs us, you will screenshot the conversation, paste it into a Claude AI template we’ve created, use the draft response to guide your own message, and send it back to the lead. Your goal is to qualify them and move them toward booking a sales call on our Calendly link.

Two: Once a client is onboarded, you will take their intake form answers, paste them into Claude, receive a complete training program, and then accurately input that program into our Kahunas coaching app using screenshot templates we provide. Speed and accuracy matter equally.

What We’re Looking For

 • Native or near-native English writing ability. Your tone in DMs must be casual, authentic, and persuasive — not robotic.

 • Attention to detail. Mistakes in program entry (wrong exercises, rep ranges, or instructions) directly impact client results.

 • Ability to follow systems and screenshots. We’ve already templated how Kahunas entries work — you execute it precisely.

 • Reliability. We need you available and responsive 15-20 hours per week to start. Consistency matters.

 • Coachability. You’ll learn our voice and our process in the first week. Be ready for feedback.

Nice to have: any experience with fitness, coaching platforms, or data entry. But willingness to learn matters more.

Hours & Pay

15-20 hours per week to start. USD 5-7 per hour based on experience and speed. Flexible scheduling within your timezone.

How to Apply

Tell us: your availability this week, one example of a sales or customer service DM you’ve written (or similar), and why you’re interested in fitness coaching. Keep it short.

title: Business Administration Officer - Permanent Remote, Flexible Hours (+10 GMT)
description:

Amigo Technology is an IT service business and Managed Service Provider (MSP), located on the Sunshine Coast, Australia. We have been operating for 15 years, with the goal of making computers and technology friendlier to our awesome small business clients. We are seeking an administrative officer to join our friendly team.



By joining the Amigo team, you will enjoy:

- A friendly team atmosphere where you’ll need a good sense of humour!

- Daily opportunities to help ordinary people with technology challenges in a team environment, with the goal of making technology friendly

- Competitive earnings, typically between 300php and 370php per hour, depending on ability and experience, plus bonuses



We are seeking a candidate who has:



- A keen interest in working in a process-driven environment and working together with a technology-focused team

- A desire to utilise a mix of creative and process-based problem solving

- Excellent English, both written and spoken

- A high level of attention to detail - you must put the word "AMIGO" in the “Additional Comments” section of our application form to be considered!

- A good sense of humour!



This position will have many opportunities for growth, and over time you will have access to internal mentoring, certificates and training programs to encourage you to work with a wider range of systems. Prior experience with the following would be greatly appreciated and will lead to greater earnings, although this is not a requirement:



- At least two years of experience working in an business administration position, ideally in IT services organisation

- Experience with various features of Xero, such as bank rules, activity statements, reporting and troubleshooting account issues

- Familiarity or experience with the Australian taxation system

- Ability to work with a variety of documents and spreadsheets, including the use of formulas and advanced formatting

- Experience with AI tools and automation



Your duties will include the following:



- Manage financial operations including accounts payable and receivable, bank reconciliation, billing, payroll processing, and financial reporting via Xero

- Oversee the complete client lifecycle by coordinating Managed Services Client (MSC) onboarding and offboarding, tracking SLA performance, and maintaining strong ongoing client relationships.

- Provide essential operational support through inventory and RMA management, meeting coordination, and regular audits of technician maintenance schedules via Quire.

- Coordinate human resources functions such as recruitment support, team rostering, leave management, and employee onboarding.

- Drive process improvement and compliance by auditing software licensing, reviewing team communications for quality, managing legal documentation, and identifying opportunities for workflow automation.

- Maintain the company's digital presence and sales collateral by executing
 campaigns, performing basic WordPress website updates, basic social media management, and organising centralised documentation.



If you have made it this far, great! Before you apply:



- You will be expected to learn quickly and contribute as part of a team. The workload will be both challenging and rewarding.

- We conduct background checks and our team is required to use managed remote workstations. Dishonest conduct will be quickly caught. If you’re thinking of using a mouse jiggler or being OE, please don’t apply.

title: Transaction Coordinator (Residential Coordinator)
description:

In this role, you’ll be responsible for making sure every applicant is fully qualified according to our policies and local laws. You’ll be the bridge between our leasing department, property managers, and prospective tenants—managing documentation, processing screenings, and ensuring leases are signed and fees are handled correctly in our system. You will also be a key resource for my Property Managers, helping them navigate tenant issues, rent payments, and move-in logistics.

You’ll handle the full screening process—including background, credit, criminal, and employment checks—while making sure all administrative fees are collected or waived as appropriate.

- Leasing & Data Entry: You will type up leases, complete all necessary paperwork, and input data into Yardi accurately and on time. This includes managing rentable items like parking and storage additions.

- Tenant Relations: You’ll be a primary point of contact for our tenants, helping them understand their leases, answering move-in questions, and guiding them through processes like subletting, reletting, or roommate changes.

- Reporting & Ledgers: I’ll rely on you to assist with updating renewals and market rents, while keeping tenant ledgers fully up to date.

- Internal Collaboration: You’ll stay in close contact with me and the rest of the team to discuss portfolio status and consult on applicant decisions before we finalize any leasing agreements.

- Assist the management team with various tasks as they arise to ensure we stay compliant with company policy and local regulations.

- Attend tea
etings to share best practices and stay aligned on our goals.

- Handle additional projects or tasks as assigned by management.



Qualifications:



-  Communication & Professionalism: You must have strong oral and written communication skills and maintain a professional demeanor at all times.

- Conflict Resolution: I need someone who can stay calm and diffuse customer concerns before they escalate.

- Technical Skills: You should be proficient in Outlook, Word, and Excel. Experience with (or a strong desire to learn) Yardi, RentCafé, Monday, DocuSign, and Mxie is a huge plus.

- Organization: High-level organizational skills and a sharp eye for detail and follow-up are non-negotiable.

- Attitude: You should bring a positive, team-oriented attitude to the desk every day.

Transactions are categorized weekly



Reconciliations are clean and up to date



Month-end is closed by the 10th consistently



Minimal errors, minimal follow-up needed

US Accounting Experience

Someone who communicates clearly and follows through



Someone dependable, no chasing, no excuses



Compensation

Your QuickBooks Online experience

title: Customer Outreach & Appointment Setter
description:
We are a mental healthcare support organization seeking a professional and articulate Telecaller to handle client communication and administrative support, with the potential to grow into a team lead role managing end-to-end operations.



Shifts:

10:00 AM – 7:00 PM EST

(Shift timings may vary on weekends and are subject to change based on operational requirements)

Working Days: Wednesday to Sunday



Key Responsibilities

-Contact US-based clients to verify Medicaid insurance details.

-Handle primarily outbound calls, along with inbound client calls, effectively.

-Convert qualified leads into active clients.

-Maintain and update records in Google Sheets.

-Leverage AI tools to streamline workflows and improve efficiency.

-Grow into a Team Lead role managing end-to-end inbound and outbound operations based on performance.

-Knowledge of Google Sheets formulas / Apps Script is a plus.



Requirements

-Strong interpersonal and customer service skills.

-Able to manage both calling tasks and administrative duties.

-Comfortable working the specified EST shifts (with flexibility as timings may vary).

-Proficiency with AI tools — specifically Claude Code, OpenAI Codex, or similar AI-powered tools — with the ability to explain how you have used them in practice.

-Proactive approach to technology adoption and process improvement.

-Leadership potential with the ability to independently manage inbound and outbound operations.



How to Apply

1)Record a Loom video starting with: "I AM THE CHOSEN ONE"



2)In the video, briefly:

-Introduce yourself.

-Explain why you're a good fit.

-Mention your preferred shift and working days.

-Share which AI tools you have used — specifically name Claude Code, Codex, or any similar tool — and explain how you've applied them.

-Highlight any experience or inclination toward team leadership and end-to-end call management.



3)Attach your updated CV along with your message.



Note: Applications without a Loom video and CV will not be considered.

title: WordPress Content VA Needed For Recipe Website - Canva Pins Included
description:
This role is focused on content production. You will be responsible for writing, editing and publishing blog posts, formatting them in WordPress, and creating Pinterest pins using Canva.



I will provide keywords, images, and clear instructions. Your role is to execute efficiently, follow the workflow, and maintain high-quality output.



This is a great opportunity if you enjoy structured work, content creation, and being part of a growing online project.



Skills

• Experience using WordPress (uploading and formatting blog posts)?

?• Strong English writing and editing skills (more human-writing experience is preferable) 

?• Experience with Canva

?• Reliable and consistent

title: Inside Sales Agent — Warm Lead Caller (Remote, LATAM)
description:
We're a U.S. marketing agency that runs growth systems for high-end home remodeling contractors — kitchens, baths, additions, ADUs. Our clients are doing $2M–$15M+ a year and they hire us to keep their sales teams busy with qualified appointments.



Your job is the first call. Homeowners fill out a form on
 or Instagram saying they want a remodel quote. You call them back inside 5 minutes, qualify them, and book the appointment with the contractor.



"This is not a script-reading job. We hire people who can have a real conversation with a 55-year-old homeowner about their kitchen and make them feel like calling back was a great decision."

What you'll actually do

Call new Meta leads within 5 minutes of submission (this is non-negotiable)

Run our qualification framework — budget, timeline, decision-maker, project scope

Book qualified appointments directly into the contractor's calendar

Follow up with no-shows and unresponsive leads on a structured cadence

Log every call, every outcome, every objection in our CRM (GoHighLevel)

Show up to a 15-minute team standup every day on video

Who we're looking for

Native or near-native English — neutral accent, easy to understand for older U.S. homeowners

2+ years phone sales experience — real estate ISA, solar, home services, or insurance preferred

You like talking to people. Not pretending to. Actually liking it.

Comfortable being recorded and coached — daily call reviews are part of the job

Reliable internet, quiet workspace, real headset (not earbuds)

Available Monday–Friday, with at least one 4–8 PM CST shift block

title: Revit Modeller (MEP/Irrigation)
description:
We are seeking a skilled and experienced Revit Modeler with a primary focus on irrigation systems. The ideal candidate will have a minimum of 3 years of experience, preferably with a background in irrigation design. While MEP (Mechanical, Electrical, Plumbing) experience is acceptable, a strong emphasis on irrigation-related projects is desired.



Responsibilities:



Revit Modeling:



-Develop detailed Revit models for irrigation systems, ensuring accuracy and compliance with project specifications.

Collaborate with project teams to integrate irrigation designs into overall building models.

Irrigation System Design:

-Utilize your expertise in irrigation to contribute to the design and planning of irrigation systems for various projects.

Work closely with engineers and landscape architects to implement efficient and sustainable irrigation solutions.



Collaboration:

-Engage in effective communication with interdisciplinary teams to coordinate irrigation designs with overall building systems.

Collaborate with project managers, architects, and other stakeholders to meet project goals and deadlines.



Quality Assurance:

-Conduct thorough reviews of Revit models to ensure accuracy, consistency, and compliance with industry standards.

Identify and resolve any conflicts or issues that may arise during the modeling process.

Qualifications:



Education:

-Bachelor's degree in a relevant field (e.g., Civil Engineering, Landscape Architecture) is preferred.



Experience:

- Minimum of 3 years of professional experience in Revit modeling, with a focus on irrigation systems.

MEP experience is acceptable, but a strong preference for candidates with significant exposure to irrigation projects.



Technical Skills:

- Proficiency in Autodesk Revit is mandatory.

-Familiarity with relevant software tools for irrigation design is a plus.

-Problem-Solving:

-Demonstrated ability to identify and solve problems related to irrigation system design and modeling.



Communication:

-Excellent communication skills, both verbal and written, to effectively convey design ideas and collaborate with diverse project teams.



Adaptability:

-Ability to adapt to changing project requirements and deadlines.



How to Apply:



Interested candidates are invited to submit their resumes and portfolios showcasing relevant irrigation and Revit modeling projects to 
 include a cover letter highlighting your specific experience in irrigation design and Revit modeling.

title: Drainage Design Engineer (Civil 3D / Revit)
description:
About Us

Water Design Engineers is an independent engineering consultancy focused on solving water in the landscape. Our work includes drainage and SuDS design, irrigation design, water feature design, constructed wetlands, water treatment coordination, and wider water infrastructure input across a range of projects.

We work closely with landscape architects, architects, developers, and other consultants to deliver practical, coordinated, technically robust design solutions.

 

The Role

We are looking for a Drainage and Water Infrastructure Design Engineer to join our team. Drainage will be the primary focus of the role, so we are looking for someone with solid experience in drainage and SuDS design who can contribute confidently to live projects from the outset.

This role is not limited to traditional drainage work. You will also support the wider team on projects involving water infrastructure, landscape-led water management, wetlands, irrigation interfaces, and related civil design coordination. We need someone who is technically capable, practical in their thinking, and willing to get involved wherever needed to help move projects forward.

We are ideally looking for someone with around 4 to 7 years of relevant experience, although strong applicants outside this range will also be considered where they can demonstrate the right technical capability, software skills, and attitude.

 

Key Responsibilities

Undertake drainage and SuDS design as the primary part of the role

Prepare drawings, design information, calculations, and technical support documents

Develop coordinated drainage layouts and levels-based solutions from available survey and design information

Use Civil 3D for drainage-related design and modelling work

Work in Revit to support model-based project coordination and design development

Coordinate with internal and external project teams including landscape architects, architects, and other consultants

Support wider water infrastructure and civil design elements where required across the company’s project portfolio

Identify technical risks, clashes, missing information, and design dependencies early

Contribute to a practical, team-focused design environment with a positive and proactive attitude

 

What We’re Looking For

Degree in Civil Engineering or similar relevant discipline

Strong drainage design experience, ideally gained over around 4 to 7 years in practice

Good working knowledge of SuDS and or external works drainage design

Proficient in Civil 3D

Able to work in Revit for design coordination

Good understanding of levels, flow paths, site constraints, and buildable design solutions

Strong communication skills and a practical, solutions-led mindset

Someone with a can-do attitude who is willing to contribute to a range of project types, not just stay in a narrow discipline box

 

Desirable

Experience working on landscape-led or multidisciplinary projects

Experience supporting drainage strategies, flood-related infrastructure, or wider water management design

Understanding of how drainage interfaces with broader external works and water infrastructure systems

 

Why Join Us

This is an opportunity to join a growing consultancy with a strong technical focus and a clear specialism in water-related design. You will be part of a team working on varied and interesting projects, with the chance to contribute beyond standard drainage design and help shape integrated water solutions across the landscape.

 

To Apply

Please send your CV at 
 and a short covering note outlining your relevant experience.

title: Project Manager & Healthcare Data Specialist
description:
Position Summary:

The Project Manager & Healthcare Data Specialist is responsible for overseeing healthcare application systems while managing data tracking, reporting, and compliance processes. This role bridges operations, technology, and data to ensure efficient workflows, regulatory compliance, and high-quality service delivery across the organization.



Key Responsibilities



Project & Systems Management



Lead the implementation, maintenance, and optimization of healthcare applications (e.g., EHR/EMR systems, compliance platforms, scheduling systems)

Develop and manage project timelines, deliverables, and system rollouts

Serve as the primary liaison between clinical, administrative, compliance, and IT teams

Coordinate with external vendors and system providers

Identify workflow inefficiencies and implement system-based solutions



Data Tracking & Reporting



Maintain accurate tracking of client, employee, and operational data

Develop and manage data tracking tools (e.g., spreadsheets, dashboards, databases)

Monitor key performance indicators (KPIs) and generate routine reports for leadership

Identify trends, gaps, and discrepancies and provide actionable insights

Ensure all documentation is organized, up-to-date, and audit-ready



Compliance & Quality Assurance



Ensure systems and data processes align with healthcare regulations (e.g., HIPAA, state licensing such as 245D and assisted living requirements)

Support internal and external audits by preparing and validating required documentation

Monitor staff and client file compliance, ensuring completeness and accuracy

Collaborate with leadership to maintain and improve policies and procedures



Training & Support



Provide onboarding and ongoing training to staff on healthcare applications and data processes

Create user guides and standard operating procedures (SOPs)

Offer technical and workflow support to improve team efficiency

title: Experienced Cold Caller
description:
Niyyah Edge - Leading Outbound AI Agency - Looking for A Superstar Cold Caller.





Are you a proven cold caller who thrives on turning “not interested” into booked B2B meetings?



We’re looking for an experienced Appointment Setter who can confidently make daily outbound cold calls and consistently book 2–3 qualified meetings per day.



If you love the hunt, don’t fear rejection, and want to get paid well — this role is for you.



What You’ll Do



Make high-volume outbound cold calls daily (AT LEAST
DIALS PER DAY)



Speak with decision-makers ONLY and qualify prospects



Overcome objections with confidence and professionalism



Book 2–3 qualified meetings per day (minimum expectation)



Accurately update CRM and track activity



What We’re Looking For



Proven experience in cold calling / appointment setting



Track record of hitting daily or weekly booking targets



Strong objection-handling skills



Clear, confident phone presence



Self-motivated and target-driven



Reliable internet + quiet calling environment

title: Executive Assistant and Partner Relations
description:
Job Title: Executive Assistant & Partner Relations Specialist (Virtual Contract Role)



Position Type: Contract | Remote | Virtual Tea
mber

Reports To:Managing Partner / Executive Leadership

Compensation:Competitive Contract-Based Compensation (Based on Experience and Scope)



 Position Overview



We are seeking a highly organized, proactive, and discreet Executive Assistant & Partner Relations Specialist to support executive leadership and strengthen strategic partner engagement. This role is ideal for a high-performing virtual professional who thrives in fast-paced environments, can manage executive priorities seamlessly, and understands the importance of maintaining strong business relationships with investors, clients, and strategic partners.



The ideal candidate combines executive support excellence with strong relationship management skills, exceptional communication abilities, and the discipline to operate independently in a remote work environment.



 Key Responsibilities



Executive Assistance



* Manage executive calendars, scheduling, and appointment coordination across multiple time zones

* Coordinate internal and external meetings, including investor calls, partner meetings, and board-level engagements

* Prepare meeting agendas, briefing documents, presentations, and follow-up action reports

* Handle executive correspondence, including
s, communication drafts, and confidential documentation

* Organize travel planning, virtual event coordination, and logistics support when required

* Maintain organized digital filing systems, reports, and administrative workflows

* Track key deadlines, priorities, and deliverables for executive leadership

* Support project execution across multiple business initiatives and strategic priorities



 Partner Relations



* Serve as a professional point of contact for investors, strategic partners, stakeholders, and high-level business relationships

* Assist in onboarding new partners, investors, and strategic collaborators

* Maintain CRM records and partner communication pipelines

* Track partner engagement activities, follow-ups, and relationship milestones

* Coordinate investor updates, reporting schedules, and partner communication touchpoints

* Support fundraising activities by managing relationship follow-up and communication flow

* Help strengthen long-term strategic relationships through consistent engagement and service excellence

* Assist with event coordination for investor meetings, networking events, and executive roundtables



Required Qualifications



* Proven experience as an Executive Assistant, Chief of Staff support, Client Relations Manager, or Partner Relations Specialist

* Strong understanding of executive operations and relationship management

* Exceptional written and verbal communication skills

* High level of professionalism, discretion, and confidentiality

* Excellent organizational and time management abilities

* Ability to work independently with minimal supervision

* Strong problem-solving skills and proactive decision-making

* Proficiency in Google Workspace, Microsoft Office, Zoom, CRM platforms, and project management tools

* Experience supporting senior executives, founders, or investment professionals preferred



Preferred Qualifications



* Background in finance, private equity, private credit, wealth management, or professional services

* Experience working with investors, family offices, institutional partners, or high-net-worth clients

* Familiarity with fundraising operations and investor relations workflows

* Experience supporting remote executive teams across multiple regions



Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)



* Executive calendar efficiency and scheduling accuracy

* Response time and communication effectiveness

* Partner satisfaction and relationship retention

* Follow-up completion rates and task execution speed

* Accuracy of reporting, documentation, and CRM management

* Ability to anticipate executive needs and reduce operational friction



 Personal Attributes



* Highly reliable and detail-oriented

* Calm under pressure and deadline-driven

* Strong interpersonal intelligence

* Solutions-oriented mindset

* Professional presence and executive maturity

* Strong sense of ownership and accountability



Why Join Us



This role offers the opportunity to work closely with senior leadership in a high-growth, high-impact environment where strategic execution and trusted relationships drive success. You will play a key role in helping leadership operate efficiently while strengthening the partnerships that power business growth.

title: New Virtual Assistant
description:
Full-Time Virtual Assistant (Operations & Admin)



Company: 30A Window Washing

Type: Full-Time (40 hrs/week)

Remote | Long-Term Position (Currently only hiring males)

If you meet the qualifications and think you might be a good fit after reading this message ---------- on whatsapp with your name and why you think I should consider you for the position.



About Us



30A Window Washing is a fast-growing, high-standard service business serving homeowners along Florida’s Emerald Coast. We’re building a real company, not a side hustle — systems, standards, and excellence matter here.



We’re looking for a reliable, sharp, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to help run the day-to-day backend of the business so the owner can focus on growth.



If you like structure, checklists, clear expectations, and being part of a winning team — keep reading.



What You’ll Be Responsible For



You will work directly with the owner and act as a key support role in daily operations.



Primary Responsibilities:



Answer and manage customer texts, calls, and
s professionally



Schedule jobs and manage the calendar



Send invoices, follow up on payments, and track job completion



Update CRM / job management system with notes and photos



Handle customer follow-ups, confirmations, and review requests



Assist with simple bookkeeping and organization



Manage internal checklists and SOPs



Support marketing follow-ups (texts,
s, reminders)



Keep things organized, clean, and on time



You are the glue that keeps operations tight.



Who This Is For



This role is for someone who:



Is extremely organized and detail-oriented



Communicates clearly and professionally in English



Follows instructions exactly



Is proactive — you don’t wait to be told twice



Can handle repetitive tasks without losing quality



Is dependable and consistent (this is HUGE)



We care more about reliability and character than fancy resumes.



Requirements



Strong written and spoken English



Stable internet and quiet work environment



Comfortable with:



Google Docs / Sheets



Scheduling tools



CRM systems (or willing to learn fast)



Available during U.S. business hours



Willing to sign a confidentiality / non-disclosure agreement



Looking for a long-term, full-time role



Pay & Growth



Competitive full-time pay (based on experience)



Performance-based raises



Long-term growth opportunity as the company scales



Stable workload with clear systems and expectations



This is not a “gig.” We want someone who grows with us.



How to Apply



When applying, include:



A short introduction about yourself



Your experience as a virtual assistant (if any)

Your availability (hours per week & time zone)

munity Posting Specialist

title: Branch Support Specialist For A Home Care - Starting At $1000/Month
description:
Company Summary



At Helper Heroes, we’re on a mission to provide exceptional care and support to home care agencies in the U.S. We believe in true partnership where our virtual assistants act as an extension of the care team. Our goal is to ensure a compassionate, innovative, and efficient care experience for clients and families alike. 



About The Role



The Branch Support Specialist (BSS) is a member of the operations team under the supervision of the Regional Vice President of Operations. The BSS is responsible for assisting Care Coordinators within their assigned region with scheduling caregivers with clients and ensuring an outstanding client experience. The BSS works directly with our clients and their families to coordinate care services. This position promotes and supports the Company’s core values of Compassion, a positive Attitude, Respect and Excellence.



Job Responsibilities



- Cover early morning calls/Nexa messages

- Assist assigned branches in daily operations; can be reassigned as needed

- Placement of caregivers with clients based on needs and preferences

- Manage client relations within assigned branches

- Maintain cases and update schedule in system with all changes and additions

- Place confirmation calls to appropriate responsible parties regarding schedule

- Proactively reach out to clients to build relationship and identify ways to create optimal experience for clients

- Assist recruiters with maintaining caregiver credentials and expiration dates and ensuring proper and current credentials are on file for all field personnel assigned

- Collaborate with Care Support staff by providing daily communication reports and transfer of phone coverage

- Maintain caregiver/client online record information and notify Payroll as appropriate

- Review and update billing rates and pay rates; confirm mileage reimbursements

- Maintain and audit client files per regional requirements

- Ensure each client has a signed Service Agreement

- Document caregiver and client i
 and complaints and follow up with the operations management and/or supervisory nurse as appropriate

- Check and follow up on caregiver telephony

- Review and respond to weekly reports

- Maintain an up-to-date caregiver availability list daily

- Follow up with caregivers who have not worked with the Company within the last month

- Document and follow up on caregiver tardiness, call-offs, and other issues as appropriate in system; Notify operations leader for guidance on escalated issues

- Support office operations and collaboration by responding to call volume, colleague absences and project implementations

- Other duties as assigned



Requirements



- College degree preferred

- Minimum of one year experience in the employment placement field preferably in the health care industry; or two years administrative experience may substitute for employment placement experience

- Excellent client/customer service skills

- Previous computer experience, proficient with MS Office products

- Proficient in problem solving, organization, and multitasking

- Comfortable working collaboratively in cross-functional teams

- Ability to communicate effectively, both verbally and in writing, with all levels of the organization



Benefits



Competitive Base Pay:  Among the highest in the homecare industry.

Make a Difference: Help ensure clients receive the best care possible.

Growth Opportunities: Room to advance and learn as we grow.

Supportive Team: We value collaboration, compassion, and a good laugh.

Remote Flexibility: Work from anywhere with your own reliable device and stable internet connection.





Ready to Be a Hero?



If you’re excited about the opportunity to join our team, where you’ll be appreciated, have a sense of purpose and inclusion and are willing to help us create a brighter, more compassionate care experience, we can’t wait to hear from you! 



To apply, click this link and submit your resume. 



We can't wait to welcome you to the team and together we make a difference!

title: Paid Media Specialist (Google & Meta Ads)
description:
I. Position Overview

We are seeking a highly analytical and performance-oriented Performance Marketing Specialist to manage, optimize, and scale paid advertising campaigns across Google Ads and Meta 
 & Instagram) platforms.

This role plays a key part in driving qualified leads, customer acquisition, and revenue growth through strategic planning, hands-on execution, and ongoing performance optimization.



II. Key Responsibilities

Plan, execute, and manage paid media campaigns across Google Ads (Search, Display, YouTube, Performance Max) and Meta Ads platforms.

Conduct audience research, keyword analysis, and competitor benchmarking to improve campaign performance.

Monitor, analyze, and optimize campaigns to achieve KPIs such as CPA, ROAS, CTR, CPC, and conversion rate.

Collaborate with creative and content teams to develop and test high-performing ad creatives and messaging.

Allocate and manage advertising budgets effectively to maximize ROI and scale successful campaigns.

Implement and maintain accurate tracking systems using Google Analytics (GA4), Google Tag Manager, Meta Pixel, and other tracking tools.

Prepare weekly and monthly performance reports with actionable insights and optimization recommendations.

Stay updated on industry trends, platform updates, and emerging performance marketing best practices.

Work cross-functionally to align paid media strategies with overall marketing and business objectives.



III. Qualifications & Requirements

1–3+ years of hands-on experience in Paid Media or Digital Advertising.

Proven experience managing campaigns on Google Ads and Meta Ads platforms.

Strong analytical skills with a data-driven decision-making approach.

Experience with performance tracking, analytics, and reporting tools.

Ability to manage multiple campaigns simultaneously and meet deadlines.

Excellent communication and teamwork skills.



IV. Preferred Qualifications

Experience in lead generation and/or e-commerce performance campaigns.

Knowledge of A/B testing, remarketing strategies, and funnel optimization.

Experience managing medium to large advertising budgets.



V. What We Offer

Competitive salary with performance-based incentives.

Opportunity to work with diverse industries and fast-growing brands.

Dynamic and fast-paced performance marketing environment.

Continuous learning and professional development opportunities.

Clear career progression pathways.



VI. How to Apply

Please submit your CV to:

title: Operations & Sales Growth Executive Assistant
description:
About Us

The Event Engineer helps entrepreneurs scale to 7-figures and beyond. Led by Lisa Barry, we build high-converting event systems and world-class client experiences. Our mission is helping visionary founders grow wealth that fuels meaningful change.



The Role

This is not a "task-taker" role; this is a high-level partnership. As the Executive Assistant, your primary mission is to protect Lisa’s time, energy, and focus. You are the gatekeeper of the brand and the architect of the founder's daily life. 



While you handle high-level EA duties, you will also manage the "backend" systems (GoHighLevel & ClickUp) and AI automations that keep the 7-figure engine running smoothly behind the scenes. You are the bridge between brand exposure and revenue.



---



1. Primary Responsibility: Executive Support & Gatekeeping



Zone of Genius Protection: You own Lisa’s calendar. You don’t just book meetings; you architect her week to ensure "Deep Work" for software development and high-level sales is never interrupted.

Inbox Zen & Triage: You are the first line of defense. You filter, label, and respond to 80% of incoming communication so Lisa only sees what truly requires her eyes.

High-EQ Representation: Whether in the DMs or via
, you represent a premium brand. You interact with high-level clients and partners with warmth, professionalism, and absolute precision.

The Digital Housekeeper: You ensure Lisa’s digital environment (Google Drive, Slack, Inbox) is organized, clutter-free, and optimized for speed.





2. Secondary Responsibility: Systems & AI (Behind the Scenes)



ClickUp Command Center (Non-Negotiable): You manage the team’s workflow. You ensure the Creative Architect, Tech Guy, and Developer are on track, using ClickUp Automations to move tasks through to the "Wednesday Drop."

GHL Pipeline Mastery (Non-Negotiable): You ensure the CRM is 100?curate. You manage lead tags and nurture sequences, ensuring no "Golden Opportunity" ever falls through the cracks.

AI Integration: You leverage AI to make the business faster. This includes using AI for meeting transcriptions, instantly turning "voice notes" into formatted SOPs, and overseeing AI-driven lead responses.



---------------------------------------------------------------
. Who You Are



The Proactive Partner: You think three steps ahead. You solve problems before the founder knows they exist.

Systems-Minded: You get a dopamine hit from a clean CRM, a perfectly structured ClickUp board, and a zero-inbox.

Owner Mentality: You don't wait for a to-do list. You see a gap in the business and you build a bridge.

Flawless Communicator: Your written English is impeccable, persuasive, professional, and polished.



---------------------------------------------------------------
. Qualifications & Skills



2–3+ Years as an EA or Ops Manager for a high-ticket coach, consultant, or agency.

GoHighLevel (GHL) Proficiency: Experience managing leads, pipelines, and workflows.

ClickUp Experience: Ability to build and manage complex project boards and automations.

AI Literacy: Comfortable using AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Otter, etc.) to automate repetitive admin tasks.



---------------------------------------------------------------
. Application Requirements



Please provide the following to be considered for Phase 1:

1.  Resume: A brief history of your experience in operations and sales support.

2.  DISC Profile: Please include your results (D% I% S% C%).

3.  Rate your proficiency (1–10) with ClickUp, GoHighLevel, and AI tools.

4.  Tell us about one specific time you "saved the day" for a founder by fixing a system or managing a chaotic inbox.



---------------------------------------------------------------
. Work Arrangement & Compensation



Remote: 9am – 5pm AEDT (Australian Eastern Time)

Hours: 40 Hours / Week

Compensation: $1,000 AUD / month (Full-Time)

title: Senior AUD Tax Accountant
description:
About the Role



We are seeking an experienced tax accountant with a strong background in Australian taxation and proficiency in Xero. The ideal candidate will have at least five years of experience in Australian tax and accounting and will be responsible for preparing financial statements and tax returns for various entity types, including companies, trusts, partnerships, and individuals.



Key Responsibilities



• Prepare financial statements and tax returns for companies, trusts, partnerships, individuals and SMSFs.

• Ensure compliance with Australian tax laws, including income tax, GST, and BAS reporting.

• Reconcile accounts and manage general ledger entries.

• Work with Xero & BGLSF360 (optional) to process transactions, maintain records, and generate reports.

• Assist in tax planning strategies and provide general tax advice as required.

• Communicate with the team to ensure deadlines and client expectations are met.

• Looking at implementing and providing Advisory information to the Director

• Assist the Director with initial reviews of financial statements, tax returns, and supporting workpapers.

• Identify basic errors, inconsistencies, and missing information prior to final review.

• Support the team by helping improve accuracy and completeness of work before submission to the Director.



Key Requirements



• Minimum 5 years of experience in Australian tax and accounting.

• Strong English literacy and speaking skills

• Proficiency in Xero & BGLSF360 (negotiable) and cloud-based accounting software.

• Strong knowledge of Australian taxation, including company tax, trust distributions, BAS, IAS, and GST.

• Experience preparing tax returns and financial statements for various entity structures.

• Ability to work independently, meet deadlines, and manage workloads efficiently.

• Strong attention to detail and problem-solving skills.

• Excellent English communication skills, both written and verbal.





What We Offer



• Competitive salary based on experience.

• Flexible remote working environment.

• Opportunity to work with a growing Australian accounting firm.

• Ongoing training and development to enhance your skills.

• Long-term career growth potential.



If you meet the qualifications and are looking for a long-term opportunity in an Australian accounting firm, we’d love to hear from you!

ntum.
