- Select the best 1–4 phone numbers per contact

- Clean and organize CSV files (Excel)

- Upload final list into Go High Level CRM

- Apply correct tags and ensure data is dial-ready

- Send completion confirmation each day



Schedule

- Monday–Friday

- 1:00 AM – 3:00 AM CST (U.S. Central Time)

- Must complete work before 8:00 AM CST deadline

- Estimated workload: ~2 hour/day



What Success Looks Like:

- Clean, accurate, dial-ready data every morning

- duplicates, minimal bad numbers

- Consistent communication and reliability



Growth Opportunity:

This role can expand into:

- CRM management

- Lead follow-up setup

- Marketing support

- We reward performance and reliability.

title: Experienced Roofing Sales Callers (weekly pay and bonuses)
description:
We are a US-based roofing company expanding our call center and hiring experienced roofing sales callers with insurance claim experience.



This is not an entry-level role. We’re looking for people who can actually sell on the phone—not just read scripts.



You’ll be given structure and scripts, but your success depends on your ability to sound natural, control the conversation, and convert US homeowners into booked appointments.



Compensation:

• $3/hour base

• 2+ sales per pay period: $4/hour

• 4+ sales per pay period: $5/hour

• $25 bonus per sale



Most reps hit 2+ sales weekly ($4/hour + $50+ bonuses).

Top performers reach $5/hour + $100+ weekly bonuses.



Schedule:

• 40 hours/week

• Monday–Friday: 11:00 AM – 8:00 PM CST

• 1-hour unpaid lunch

• Optional Saturdays: 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM CST



Who This Is For



We are not looking for robotic script readers.



We are looking for reps who can:

• Use a script without sounding scripted

• Hold a natural, back-and-forth conversation

• Ask smart questions and keep prospects engaged

• Handle objections confidently

• Build quick rapport with US homeowners



Requirements:

• Excellent English fluency

• Natural American accent

• Minimum 1 year cold calling experience

• MUST HAVE roofing insurance claim experience

• Roofing, solar, or real estate campaign experience preferred



If you rely on reading line-by-line without adapting, this is not a fit.

Application Process (Important)



We do not provide training for the initial screening.



To be considered:



You will be given a specific time slot

You will call directly and pitch us an appointment (live test)

We will evaluate how you:

• Open the call

• Build rapport

• Handle objections

• Close for the appointment



This is designed to confirm real experience, not rehearsed answers.

title: Seasoned Cold Caller (Roofing knowledge) – Hourly Pay + Sales Bonuses
description:
This isn’t a “read the script and hope” role.

You’ll be working inside a proven sales system with clear expectations, real earning potential, and fast growth based on results.



COMPENSATION THAT REWARDS PERFORMANCE



$25 BONUS for every sale — no caps, paid every pay period.



Base Pay:

• $3/hour starting

• 2+ sales per pay period: $4/hour

• 4+ sales per pay period: $5/hour



Most reps hit 2+ sales weekly, earning $4/hour + $100+ in bonuses every two weeks.

Top performers consistently reach $5/hour + $200+ in bonuses per pay period.



If you can sell, you’ll feel it in your pay immediately.



WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING



• Cold calling US homeowners using a dialer

• Qualifying and converting leads into booked appointments

• Using a structured script — without sounding scripted

• Hitting clear weekly and bi-weekly sales targets



SCHEDULE



• Monday – Friday: 11:00 AM – 8:00 PM CST

• 1-hour unpaid break

• Optional Saturdays: 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM CST



WHO THIS IS FOR



We are specifically hiring reps who already know how to sell.



• Strong English communication (neutral to American accent preferred)

• Minimum 1 year cold calling experience

• Roofing, solar, insurance claims, or real estate experience preferred

• Confident handling objections and pushing for the close



If you don’t meet the experience requirement, this is not the right fit.



APPLICATION PROCESS (READ CAREFULLY)



We do not rely on interviews alone — we test real ability.



To be considered:



• Submit a 30-second intro video covering:

– Your cold calling experience

– Relevant campaign experience (roofing, solar, insurance, etc.)

– Your availability for a 9:00 AM CST interview



• Qualified applicants will be given a specific time slot to call us and pitch an appointment live

• No training will be provided for this step — this is intentional



We evaluate how you:

• Open the call

• Build rapport

• Handle objections

• Close for the appointment



This ensures we only move forward with proven callers, not script readers.



We’re interviewing daily at 9:00 AM CST and hiring immediately.



If you want a role where your performance directly drives your income, and you know how to turn conversations into booked appointments — apply now.

title: CONTENT RESEARCH EXPERT (CRE): $800 a month
description:
BENEFITS



- Full-time position: 7.5 hours/day

- Schedule: Monday to Friday, flexible time

- Salary: $800 a month

- Paid every two weeks via Wise. (direct to your bank account, almost no fees, no waiting for payday!)

- Full work-from-home flexibility

- A young, supportive team that values your output without micromanagement

- Clear growth path with opportunities to expand your role

- Join our international team working with established content creators and brands

- Work with the latest AI tools and social media platforms



TASKS



TASK #1: Research and Curate Viral Content



- Research 30-50 viral short-form videos on Instagram Reels and TikTok

- Strategically select content ideas that will help specific clients go viral

- Organize all content ideas in the "Client Master Sheet"

- Copy/paste links to each content piece

- Write out the hook of each content piece

- Categorize content (Hero Story, Educational, Entertaining, Promotional)

- Add precise video instructions on how each piece can be replicated



TASK #2: Provide Strategic Content Direction



- Analyze client information (niche, target audience, personality, content style)

- Identify and recommend 3 inspirational accounts for clients to follow in their niche

- Create detailed instructions for content replication tailored to the client's abilities

- Think strategically about what will help each client succeed



TASK #3: Administrative Responsibilities



- Maintain a content library categorized by niche for efficient future use

- Complete daily End-of-Day Reports (EOD)

- Attend multiple meetings with your manager each week

- Continuously improve content recommendations based on what works



REQUIREMENTS



- Excellent English skills (C1 or above - non-negotiable!)

- Previous experience in content creation is a MUST

- Experience in content research and trend analysis

- Strong understanding of what makes content go viral

- Knowledge of Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts features

- Strategic thinking and attention to detail

- Ability to provide clear, actionable instructions

- Reliable internet connection and professional home office setup

- 100% say-do ratio and commitment to deadlines



HOW TO APPLY



ROUND 1: Complete our application form and record a personal introduction:



Fill out the form: 
/to/QRoz4WLV



Note: Put "CRE" + [Your Name & Family Name] in the "Name" field in the form.



Record a 3-minute Loom video introducing yourself (instructions in form)



Important: Please provide genuine, personal responses (no AI-written answers). We want to get to know YOU!



ROUND 2: Qualified candidates will be invited for an interview.



MORE ABOUT US



We've been in the industry since 2019 and have worked with over 3000 clients. We currently receive around 80-100 new clients per month. We provide an "80% done-for-you content & monetization system" that helps creators go viral and turn views into income using short-form content, AI, and proven strategies.



MORE ABOUT US



- About Young Publisher: 



P.S. Young Publisher is the recruitment company. Successful candidates will work under Social Influence Consulting LLC.

title: Video Editor Wanted – UK Start-Up (Fantasy Content)
description:
Video Editor Wanted – UK Start-Up (Fantasy Content)



We are a UK-based start-up creating scroll-stopping, fantasy-inspired content for audiences who enjoy series such as Game of Thrones and House of the Dragon.



Our content focuses on folklore storytelling, character analysis, and on-camera discussions led by one of our directors. We have an engaged but growing fan base and are looking for a talented Video Editor to help us scale our content—primarily across TikTok and other social media platforms.



Your Role

Edit engaging short-form videos designed to capture attention and drive performance

Add dynamic text overlays, captions, and transitions optimised for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and Meta platforms

Optimise content for platform-specific formats, trends, and placements

Enhance pacing, music, and hooks to maximise viewer retention and engagement

Collaborate with the team to test, refine, and improve video performance

Requirements

Proficiency in video editing tools such as Adobe Premiere Pro, After Effects, CapCut, or similar

Ability to edit efficiently without compromising on quality

Strong understanding of short-form content trends and social media algorithms

Excellent attention to detail and storytelling ability

Ability to follow creative direction while also contributing ideas

Reliable, organised, and able to meet deadlines consistently

Access to a stable internet connection and suitable editing setup



An interest in fantasy content, particularly Game of Thrones and House of the Dragon, is desirable but not essential.



What We Offer

Competitive salary plus performance-based bonuses

Opportunity to work on creative, engaging fantasy content

Be part of a fast-growing, ambitious start-up with room for progression

How to Apply

Send your portfolio, including examples of short-form or UGC-style edits

Use the subject line: “Video Editor – Game of Thrones”

Include 2–3 sentences explaining why you’re a strong fit for this role

title: Marketing & Operations Assistant (Short-Term Rentals)
description:
Job Title: Marketing & Operations Assistant (Short-Term Rentals)



We are a growing short-term rental accommodation and relocation agency seeking a proactive and detail-oriented Marketing & Operations Assistant to join our team.



Key Responsibilities

Manage and optimise property listings across platforms such as Airbnb, Booking.com, Google, and our company website

Collaborate closely with the Director to implement competitive pricing strategies that maximise bookings

Maintain and operate our channel management system (Uplisting)

Plan, create, and publish engaging content across our social media platforms

Design and edit basic marketing videos for listings and social media

Provide administrative support to the Directors, including ad hoc projects and day-to-day operational tasks

About You

Excellent communication skills, both written and verbal, in English

Strong attention to detail and organisational skills

A proactive problem solver with a positive, can-do attitude

Self-motivated and committed to delivering high-quality work

Professional, polite, calm, and personable in all interactions

Experience or skills in video design and editing



Previous experience in customer service and/or working night shifts is desirable but not essential.



Working Requirements

Availability to work a minimum of 2–3 hours per day

Must be able to work within UK working hours

Availability to work weekends at least once a month



Compensation

£4 per hour

Application Requirements



Interested applicants must submit the following:



CV/Resume in PDF format

Internet speed test result (dated February 2026 onwards)

At least two professional references (including name, relationship,
 address, and mobile number)

A photo of your home office setup, clearly showing your computer and backup systems

A 1-minute introductory video

Completed pre-interview questions via this chat

Please Note

Incomplete applications will not be considered

Applications not sent to the specified
 address will be rejected



We look forward to hearing from you. Thank you for your time and interest.

title: Part-Time Web Systems Engineer (Netlify + Firebase | Ongoing Work)
description:
We are looking for a senior-level web operator who prefers part-time work or managing multiple clients, to help refine and maintain live web systems.



This is not a full-time role.



This is for someone who is already experienced and wants consistent, flexible weekly work without heavy time commitment.



Low hours (expected ~5–10 hrs/week)

Ongoing, long-term work

Flexible schedule

Role Overview

All projects are already live (Netlify + Firebase).



Your role is to:

step in, understand quickly, fix issues, and keep systems clean and working



You will not be micromanaged.

You will be expected to operate independently and make smart decisions.



What You’ll Be Doing:

Reviewing live sites and identifying issues proactively

Fixing bugs and cleaning up inconsistent logic

Improving frontend quality (layout, spacing, responsiveness)

Ensuring Firebase data flows correctly (basic–moderate level)

Connecting or fixing forms, dashboards, and user data

Making small but meaningful system improvements

Keeping projects stable as they evolve

Tech Stack

Netlify (deployment already handled)

Firebase (Firestore, Auth, light Functions)

JavaScript / React



Who This Is For:

A senior or highly capable developer who...

Prefers part-time work

Works with multiple clients

Can jump into existing systems without hand-holding

Someone who:

Spots problems quickly

Fixes things cleanly

Doesn’t overcomplicate simple systems



Who This Is NOT For....

Junior developers needing training

Developers who need detailed step-by-step instructions

Anyone looking for a full-time or high-hour role



How to Apply 

To be considered, include:

2–3 examples of live projects you’ve worked on

A short answer (max 5 sentences):

“When stepping into an existing web app, what are the first 3 things you check?”

Confirm your availability (hours per week)





Why This Role Works

Consistent weekly work

No heavy meetings or micromanagement

Straightforward tasks, clear expectations

Ability to stack with other clients





Growth Potential

If the fit is strong:

Increased hours

Higher weekly rate

Larger system ownership

Bottom Line

We are not looking for someone to build from scratch.



We are looking for someone who can:

step into live systems, clean them up, and keep them running properly with minimal oversight.

title: B2B Appointment Setter
description:
Position: B2B Appointment Setter 



Job Description: Set qualified appointments for a variety of industries. 



Location: Remote Position

Schedule: Monday–Friday, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM Mountain Time (MT)

Employment Type: Full-Time



Required Qualifications



2+ Years of experience in B2B cold calling & appointment setting



Strong written and spoken English communication skills



Confident speaking with business owners, executives, and managers



Organized and detail-oriented with good time management



Comfortable working with CRM systems such as GHL, spreadsheets, and outreach tools



Reliable internet connection and quiet work environment



Self-motivated and able to work independently during assigned hours



Compensation = Base+bonus+commission=OTE 



On Target Earnings (OTE) for this position are approximately $1,500 to $2,500 per month, with the potential to earn much more based on results.



Instructions for  how to apply



Submit A short introduction
 with the below details ONLY



Note: Please do not send resumes, recordings, or anything but what is listed below



Name &
 address to reach you

How many years of experience do you have with B2B appointment setting?

What Industries do you have experience with?

How many
s do you typically send per month?

How many appointments of those appointments show up and are completed per month?

title: Paid Social Media Ads Specialist (Work From Home)
description:
Paid Social Media Ads Specialist (Work From Home)



We’re a fast-growing digital marketing agency looking for a Media Buyer & Tech Specialist who can move fast, follow proven systems, and help scale client campaigns.



This is NOT a boring, repetitive role — you’ll be in the trenches running ads, setting up client accounts, and making sure everything runs smoothly. If you’re detail-oriented, tech-savvy, and hungry to grow, we want you on our team.



1. Responsibilities



Refresh underperforming ad campaigns weekly



Test new creative angles (videos/images) to lower CPL



Keep ad management dashboards updated daily



Complete client onboarding within 48 hours of contract signing



Set up integrations, tracking, pixels, and assets with zero errors



Flag issues early and escalate problems before they grow



Follow SOPs accurately, and improve them as needed



2. KPIs (Your Success Metrics)



100% of flagged campaigns refreshed weekly



Campaigns live within 2 business days of contract



Less than 1 onboarding error per month



Flag campaigns with CPL above $90



Positive feedback from client onboarding surveys



3. Qualifications



Experience running
/Instagram ads (Meta Ads Manager)



Strong English skills (written & spoken)



Comfortable with tech: pixels, tracking, GHL, CRMs



Obsessed with accuracy and detail



Fast executor who thrives in a fast-paced environment



Previous experience in an agency or startup is a plus



4. Salary & Benefits



Starting pay: $1500–$2000 USD/month (based on experience)



Full-time, 100% remote



Direct mentorship from the founder



Opportunity to grow into senior or leadership roles



Flexible hours with a results-driven culture



***This Role Is Not For You If:



You need constant supervision or hand-holding

You’re careless with details

You’re afraid of new tools or tech

You want a slow-moving 9–5 job



Why Join Us?



We’re not just another agency. We move fast, we love solving problems, and we give A-players the space to grow. If you’re ambitious and want to build your career in digital marketing, this is your chance.



How to Apply:

Do NOT apply directly here.

You must apply using this form:

title: Experienced Graphic Designer (Funnel Building is a plus)
description:
DAP Brands is seeking a creative, detail-oriented, and high-performing Graphic Designer who is passionate about visual storytelling and brand consistency. This role goes beyond execution. We are looking for someone who can think creatively, take ownership of design projects, and collaborate closely with the marketing team to produce visually compelling assets that effectively communicate our brand message.



Experience in funnel building is a strong plus for designers who enjoy working in performance-driven marketing environments.



Responsibilities:

- Collaborate with the marketing team to develop creative concepts and design solutions for digital ads, social media graphics, website banners, funnels, print collateral, and more.

- Create visually engaging, on-brand graphics, illustrations, and layouts aligned with company branding and messaging.

- Produce high-quality designs from concept to completion, ensuring accuracy, consistency, and adherence to brand guidelines.

- Manage multiple design projects simultaneously while meeting deadlines in a fast-paced environment.

- Stay current with design trends, tools, and best practices to continuously improve and elevate visual content.



Requirements:

- Minimum 2 years of experience in Graphic Design, Visual Communication, or a related field.

- Proven experience as a Graphic Designer, preferably in a fast-paced or agency environment.

- Proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign) and related design tools.

- Strong portfolio showcasing digital and print design work.

- Excellent creative, conceptual, and visual design skills with strong attention to detail.

- Strong communication and collaboration skills, with the ability to clearly present and explain design concepts.

- Experience in funnel building is a plus, but not required.



Application Instructions:

Please submit your application through the online form provided: 



- To be considered, you MUST type “MAVERICK” in front of your full name if you are applying via our website: 

- If you are a Graphic Designer who takes ownership, values quality, and thrives in a fast-moving creative environment, we invite you to apply.

title: YouTube Virtual Assistant
description:
Hello, my name is Tiffany Dionne and I’m an author and motivational speaker. I share stories to encourage women to overcome life’s obstacles. 



Are you creative, reliable, and know how to bring a brand to life online?



I’m looking for someone who can:



• Edit YouTube videos

• Design scroll-stopping thumbnails

• Create on-brand graphics

• Drive traffic to my YouTube channel with SEO

• Can create shorts and repurpose content for IG/FB/TikTok

• Familiar with adding captions, transitions, b-roll, and light effects

• Ability to tell a story through pacing, music, and tone



Length: This is a long term position. I’m looking forward to working with someone who can bring passion and ideas for growth!



Pay: Weekly



Before applying, send the following:



• A YouTube thumbnail you’ve designed

• A long form YouTube video you’ve edited

• A Short YouTube video you’ve edited



Note: Only applicants who send the above qualifications will be considered.

title: AI Powered Virtual Assistant
description:
Scale Your Backend (SYB) is an AI consulting and implementation firm. We build real AI systems for real businesses, not strategy decks. We're looking for a sharp VA who doesn't just use AI as a shortcut. They use it as a thinking tool.

This isn't a "copy-paste tasks" role. You'll be working directly with the founder to keep operations moving, spot inefficiencies, and proactively bring ideas to the table.



What you'll do:



Data Entry

Manage inbox, scheduling, and CRM updates using AI-assisted workflows

Research prospects, industries, and tools and summarize findings clearly

Help produce and repurpose content across YouTube, LinkedIn,
/X, and Instagram

Run 
/Zapier automations and flag when something could be improved

Use Claude, ChatGPT, and other AI tools daily, not occasionally

Proactively suggest better ways to do things (this is a big one)



What we're looking for:



Comfortable with Claude, ChatGPT, and Claude Code is a BONUS

Familiar with tools like 
, Notion, Zapier, or similar

Strong written English, you'll be drafting communications on my behalf

Self-directed, you don't wait to be told, you bring solutions

Bonus: experience with Airtable, Supabase, Google Sheets automation, or AI prompting



This role is NOT for you if:



You want to be told exactly what to do every day

You've never used AI in your actual workflow

You treat AI as a gimmick instead of a productivity multiplier

title: Call small UK businesses to retrieve information
description:
???? Sales Superstar Wanted — Remote | Full Time | UK Hours

Are you the kind of person who lights up on a phone call? Who can make a stranger smile in the first 10 seconds? Who genuinely loves the feeling of booking a meeting?

We want you.

Who we are

We're a fast-growing UK health and wellness company on a mission to make workplaces healthier and happier. We're small, ambitious, and moving fast — and we need a brilliant sales rep to help us grow.

What you'll actually do

Make outbound calls to UK businesses. Introduce our product. Book demo meetings for our team. Follow up via
 and LinkedIn. That's it. No complicated tech. No hard sell. Just great conversations.

What we need from you

? Proficient English — this is non-negotiable. You'll be speaking to UK business owners and HR managers daily. Your English must be clear, confident, and natural on a phone call.

? Experience in outbound sales, BPO, or cold calling

? Available to work UK business hours (9am–5pm GMT)

? Reliable internet connection

? Positive energy — seriously, it matters on calls

What you get



Competitive salary + performance bonuses

Fully remote, work from home

Be part of something early — ground floor opportunity with a company going places

Supportive team, clear targets, no micromanagement



How to apply

Send a short voice recording (60 seconds) introducing yourself and why you'd be great at this. Written applications without a voice note will not be considered.

title: Lead Generation Manager
description:
Nexus Energy Solutions works with commercial and industrial businesses to identify opportunities for more cost-efficient energy solutions. We focus on the warehouse, logistics, and manufacturing sectors where energy usage is high and optimisation opportunities are significant.



We are seeking a detail-oriented Lead Generation Specialist to research and build a targeted database of warehouse, logistics, and manufacturing businesses across Melbourne, Australia.



Your role is to identify companies operating large industrial or warehouse facilities and collect accurate, high-quality business information. This data will be used to support commercial energy outreach initiatives.



Requirements:

Experience in lead generation, data research, or online sourcing

Strong attention to detail and accuracy

Ability to follow structured instructions

Good English communication skills

Ability to apply judgment (not just copy/paste data)

title: 360° Facebook Ads Specialist
description:
360°
 Ads Specialist (All Industries – Lead Quality Focused)

Remote | Part-Time or Full-Time

Work Hours: 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM AWST



Please Read Before Applying

This role is not for beginners or task-based media buyers.

We are looking for a 360°
 Ads Specialist who understands:



Lead quality

Funnel intent

How ads actually turn into booked calls, walk-ins, ticket sales, and revenue



Not just low CPL.

If you've run:



Lead form ads AND website/landing page campaigns

Local service lead generation

Low-ticket escalation funnels

Direct-to-high-ticket offers

Event and nightclub promotion campaigns



Keep reading.



What You'll Do

You will own
 Ads end to end — from traffic strategy to lead quality — across multiple industries including trades, health and fitness, real estate, professional services, events, nightclubs, and more.

This is a fast-paced environment. Campaigns often need to be built, launched, and optimised on tight turnarounds — sometimes same day. You need to move quickly without compromising quality. If you need three days to launch a simple campaign, this is not the right fit.



Build, launch, and optimise Meta 
 & Instagram) ad campaigns — often under tight deadlines

Run multiple funnel types: lead forms, website and landing page traffic, low-ticket front-end offers, direct-to-high-ticket offers, local service lead generation, event and nightclub promotion

Run event-specific campaigns: ticket sales, guestlist builds, event awareness, last-minute promo pushes, weekly recurring events

Create and test UGC-style, video, and static ad creatives (working with our design team for production assets)

Continuously improve lead quality, not just CPL

Test hooks, offers, creatives, and funnel structures

Manage TOF / MOF / BOF campaign structures

Proactively refresh ads (fatigue, seasons, new promos)

Respond quickly when campaigns need changes — you do not sit on underperforming ads

Collaborate with our CRM and automation team to ensure leads are being followed up and qualified properly

Report clearly on what is working, what is not, and what you are changing — no vanity metrics





Must-Have Experience (Non-Negotiable)



Proven experience running
 Ads for local service businesses (trades, fitness, medical, legal, real estate, or similar)

Proven experience running
 Ads for events, nightclubs, or entertainment venues — you understand time-sensitive promotion, urgency-driven campaigns, and short sales windows

Experience with both lead form ads and website/landing page traffic

Experience running:



Local service lead generation

Low-ticket escalation funnels

Direct-to-high-ticket offers

Event ticket sales and guestlist campaigns





Strong understanding of lead quality and intent — you know the difference between a cheap lead and a booked job

Ability to analyse performance beyond CPL (CTR, CVR, booking rate, lead-to-sale quality)

Experience managing multiple client accounts simultaneously

Ability to work fast under pressure — events do not wait, promos drop with short notice, and you need to execute quickly without cutting corners

A proactive mindset — you don't wait to be told what to fix



If your experience is only lead forms or only traffic, please do not apply.

If your experience is only ecommerce or only brand awareness, this is not the right fit.



Nice to Have (Optional)



Experience working with GoHighLevel (GHL) or similar CRM platforms

Understanding of lead qualification, follow-up logic, and speed-to-lead

Experience creating ad creatives in Canva or directing a designer with clear briefs

Loom walkthroughs of past campaigns

Experience with Google Ads (we run both — there may be opportunity to expand your role)

Sales or customer service background





Why Work With Us



Work directly with the founder — no layers of middle management

No micromanagement — clear ownership and accountability

Long-term clients across multiple industries — stable, varied workload

Fast-moving agency that values speed and quality equally

Performance-focused, no-fluff environment

You will have access to a design team for creative production — you focus on strategy and execution

Remote role with consistent hours and weekly pay





Hours & Pay



Remote role (Philippines preferred)

Working hours: 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM AWST

Weekly pay via Wise

Part-time or full-time (based on performance and workload)

Long-term opportunity for the right operator





How to Apply (Important)

To be considered, please send:



A short intro or Loom video explaining:



Your
 Ads experience

The industries you have worked with (especially events, nightclubs, or local services)

The funnel types you've run (lead forms, landing pages, local, low-ticket, high-ticket, event promotion)





2–3 examples of
 ad campaigns you've managed (screenshots, results, or case studies)

Your timezone and daily availability



Applications without real funnel experience details will not be reviewed.



Final Filter

This role is for 360° operators, not button-pushers.

If you:



Think beyond CPL

Adapt funnels based on lead quality

Move fast without dropping quality

Take ownership of results across multiple industries

Communicate clearly without being chased



You'll thrive here.

title: Remote Architect
description:
We are seeking a licensed Architect or highly experienced architectural professional with a strong background in working with US-based clients to join our team. In this role, you will be responsible for producing precise elevations, coordinating MEP (mechanical, electrical, plumbing) layouts, and ensuring that all measurements are meticulously verified. This position requires a deep understanding of construction documentation, interior architecture, and the ability to bridge the gap between conceptual design and technical execution. You will work during U.S business hours and get paid weekly.



To prioritize your application, please complete the assessment: 



Qualifications

- Bachelor’s degree in Architecture (or related field) with 2-3 years of professional experience.



- Proven experience working directly with US-based architecture firms, developers, or clients (knowledge of US building standards, imperial units, and architectural workflows is required).



- Strong creative vision balanced with technical precision.



- Demonstrated ability to manage complex project workflows with high attention to detail.



Responsibilities



- Utilize existing SketchUp models to develop detailed architectural plans, elevations, and construction details. Verify all measurements for electrical, plumbing, and structural elements to ensure accuracy.



- Collaborate with US-based clients, vendors, and internal tea
mbers to interpret project goals, address client needs, and ensure design intent is maintained through the construction documentation phase.



- Prepare high-quality client presentations, including 3D mock-ups and renderings, to communicate design concepts effectively.



- Assist in preparing project quotes, ensuring adherence to the full project workflow from schematic design through to construction administration.



- Maintain up-to-date knowledge of industry standards, building technologies, and architectural best practices to ensure all deliverables meet professional standards.



- Handle project documentation, record-keeping, and vendor management to ensure seamless project delivery.



To proceed, please include an updated PDF copy of your CV and portfolio or sample works.

title: YouTube Editor (Movie Clips + Story Clips)
description:

We’re hiring a YouTube Video Editor to create movie recap videos by turning full-length films into engaging 10–20 minute videos.



You’ll be editing 2 videos per week in a simple, proven format similar to:



Movie Recaps Official

Warner Movie Recaps



This is a simple, repeatable editing style — nothing overly complex.



???? What You’ll Do

Turn full movies into 10–20 minute recap videos

Start with a strong hook (first 10–20 seconds) using the most exciting part of the movie

Edit using AI voiceover (provided or generated)

Follow a clear, structured script (no filler words or fluff)

Cut and arrange clips to match the narration

Keep pacing fast, clean, and engaging (no slow moments)

???? Requirements

Experience with YouTube video editing

Ability to follow a simple format exactly

Understanding of basic storytelling + pacing

Good English comprehension (important for script timing)

Reliable and able to deliver 2 videos per week

???? Bonus (Not Required)

Experience with movie recap channels

Experience using AI voice tools

Familiar with YouTube automation

???? Pay

Per video (based on experience)

Consistent weekly work (long-term)

Send:



Your portfolio (YouTube videos only)

Any similar content (if available)

Your rate per video

Include the word “HOOK” in your application

???? Key Notes (IMPORTANT)

Hook must grab attention in the first 10–20 seconds

Script must be clear, straight to the point (no filler words)

Editing style = simple, clean, high-retention

Add black bars for a cinematic look

title: AI Sales Performance Strategist
description:
About the Job

This isn't a traditional sales role. We're not looking for someone who can work a CRM and make 50 calls a day. We're looking for someone who uses AI to do what a team of 10 used to do — and then closes the deals themselves.

At Penji, we believe the next generation of sales isn't about working harder. It's about building smarter systems. You'll use AI to deeply understand your ICPs, map their workflows, identify their pain before they say a word, and reach them with messaging so precise it doesn't feel like cold outreach at all. Then you'll close them.

If you've ever thought "I could 10x my output if I just had the right systems" — and then actually built those systems — this role was written for you.



About Penji

Since 2017, Penji has given businesses on-demand access to the top 2% of graphic designers. We're the leader in design subscription services, recognized by Inc. Magazine as one of the fastest-growing companies in the country. We're not just building a business — we're building something worth being part of.



What You'll Own

AI-Powered ICP Research & Workflow Mapping

Use AI to build deep profiles of your ideal prospects — their tools, workflows, team structures, pain points, and buying triggers

Identify where design bottlenecks live inside an agency or brand before you ever send a message

Map decision-maker hierarchies and find the right entry point for every account

Turn a 2-hour research process into a 10-minute one — without losing depth or personalization



Outreach at Massive Scale

Build and run AI-powered outreach systems across
, LinkedIn, and emerging channels that feel 1:1 even at volume

Use AI to generate, test, and iterate on messaging angles, subject lines, and hooks faster than any human team could

Own your own meeting pipeline — no waiting on leads, no excuses. You prospect, you book, you close

Continuously experiment with new channels and use AI to scale what converts



Sales & Closing

Run the full sales cycle from first touch to signed contract — demos, objection handling, follow-up, close

Use AI to anticipate objections before calls, prepare responses, and walk in knowing more about the prospect than they expect

Maintain a clean, real-time pipeline with next actions on every deal

Report close rate, deal size, and conversion metrics weekly — and own the numbers



Workflow Building & Continuous Improvement

Build reusable AI workflows for prospecting, personalization, research, and follow-up that compound over time

Evaluate new AI sales tools as they launch and implement the ones that give Penji an edge

Contribute to team prompt libraries, playbooks, and SOPs that raise the floor for everyone

Get 1% better every month — in AI, in sales, and in understanding the people you're selling to



What We're Looking For

3+ years in sales, business development, or outreach with a proven closing record

Hands-on experience using AI tools — ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, or equivalent — specifically applied to sales workflows

Deep understanding of prompt engineering for prospecting, personalization, objection handling, and sequence building

Experience with outreach platforms and CRMs — Apollo, Instantly, Smartlead, HubSpot, or similar

Someone who has actually built AI workflows, not just used AI occasionally

Sharp written communicator — you write copy that gets replies

Self-directed, metrics-obsessed, and uncomfortable with stagnation

Bonus: experience in affiliate or influencer marketing



How to Apply

To ensure your application stands out:

1. Complete the application form: 

2 . Attach your portfolio or relevant work samples.

title: Executive Assistant
description:
I own a nephrology practice in the United States. This is a full-time remote position supporting business operations, reporting, and external communications. Prior experience in a US medical office or healthcare business environment is required.



About the role

You will support the physician-owner with the business side of running a growing medical practice. This includes managing ongoing spreadsheets and reports, drafting professional outreach to potential partners, sending letters of intent, and following up on business development activities. This role sits at the intersection of clinical operations and business strategy, and we need someone who is sharp, highly professional, and extremely organized.



What you’ll be doing

You will build, maintain, and update spreadsheets and operational reports on an ongoing basis, analyze data and prepare clear summaries for the physician, and draft and send professional
s to potential business partners and referral sources. You will prepare letters of intent and formal business correspondence, follow up on outreach efforts and track the status of partnership conversations, manage the physician’s calendar and inbox as needed, and support special projects and business development initiatives.



Who we’re looking for

We need someone with proven experience as an executive assistant or operations coordinator, ideally with prior exposure to a US medical office or healthcare business environment. You should have advanced proficiency in Google Sheets or Microsoft Excel including formulas, pivot tables, and dashboards, excellent professional writing skills for formal correspondence and partner outreach, strong analytical thinking, and outstanding organizational skills with sharp attention to detail. Discretion when handling sensitive business information is essential.



Important

This position supports a US-based medical practice. Experience supporting US-based clients or working within US business operations is required. Candidates without this background will not be considered.



How to apply

Send a short introduction about yourself and your executive assistant or operations experience. Please answer this question: “Describe a report or spreadsheet system you built or managed. What was it tracking and how did it help the person you supported?” Applications that skip this question will not be reviewed.

title: Bilingual Phone Operator (English / Spanish)
description:
I own a practice in Florida. This is a full-time remote position supporting a busy medical practice, and we are looking for someone with real experience working in a US medical office environment.



About the role

You will be the first point of contact for patients calling the clinic. This means handling a high volume of inbound calls, scheduling and confirming appointments, routing calls to the right departments, and processing pharmacy refill requests. You must be fully fluent in both English and Spanish. Candidates who also speak Haitian Creole will be strongly preferred and prioritized.



What you’ll be doing

You will answer inbound patient calls in English and Spanish in a professional and compassionate manner. You will schedule, reschedule, and confirm patient appointments across clinic locations, route calls to the correct provider or staff member, handle pharmacy refill requests, and document call details accurately in the practice management system. You will maintain patient confidentiality and HIPAA compliance at all times.



Who we’re looking for

We need someone who is fully fluent in English and Spanish, both written and spoken. Haitian Creole fluency is a strong bonus. You must have prior experience working in a US medical office, clinic, or healthcare call center, and be familiar with appointment scheduling and medical phone protocols. A professional phone manner, clear communication under pressure, and a working knowledge of basic medical terminology are all important. You must be HIPAA-aware and comfortable handling sensitive patient information.



Important

This position supports a US-based medical practice. US medical office experience is required. Candidates without US healthcare experience will not be considered.



How to apply

Send a short introduction about yourself, your language fluency levels, and your US medical office experience. Please also answer this question: “Describe a time you handled a difficult or frustrated patient caller. What did you do and how did it resolve?” Applications that skip this question will not be reviewed.

title: Technical Staffing Operations Specialist
description:
Job Title: Technical Staffing Operations Specialist (US Government Contracting) 

Salary: $3.00 USD / Hour 

Work Schedule: 8AM-4PM EST 



About the Company



We are Abrahams Consulting LLC, a New York City-based Minority and Women-Owned Business Enterprise (MWBE) specialized in government contracting and staffing. We operate under a strict Quality Management System (QMS) compliant with ISO 9001 standards.



About the Role



We are looking for a meticulous Technical Staffing Operations Specialist to join our team. In this role, you will provide specialized technical staffing support services. Because we serve government agencies, this position requires zero-defect delivery, strict confidentiality, and adherence to Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs).





What You Will Do



1. Government Solicitation Management



Data Acquisition: Systematically gather and verify vendor and opportunity information from the NYC Passport system and similar platforms.



Review: Review incoming government solicitations to identify deliverables with 100?curacy.



Dissemination: Filter and share relevant opportunities with our Vendor Partners (VPs) within set turnaround times.



2. Candidate Processing & Quality Assurance



Resume Vetting: Screen candidate resumes against strict government requirements (mandatory skills, years of experience).



Resume Editing: Format and edit resumes to meet standardized Company and Client presentation standards.



Onboarding: Manage the administrative onboarding process for new Vendor Partners.



Continuous Improvement: Document feedback on submissions to help improve our staffing process.



3. Project Management



Asana Management: Maintain real-time accuracy of project tracking fields in Asana; tasks must be updated daily.



Submission Tracking: Proactively track the status of submitted candidates and log all client communications.



Document Control: Maintain all records in company cloud storage with strict version control (e.g., v1.0, v1.1).





Requirements



ISO 9001 Mindset: You must be willing to strictly follow documented SOPs and Work Instructions.



Attention to Detail: We require zero-defect delivery. If errors occur, you must participate in "Root Cause Analysis" to prevent recurrence.





Tech Savvy: Proficiency in Asana, Cloud Storage, and web-based portals (NYC Passport).





Data Security: You must strictly protect sensitive government data and PII. Data must never be stored on personal devices.





Compensation & Benefits



Rate: $3.00 USD per hour.



Payment: Paid via PayPal in US Dollars.



Evaluation: You will undergo a monitored 90-Day Probationary Assessment Period.



Growth: Successful completion of probation and meeting quality targets constitutes eligibility for a salary grade review.



How to Apply



Please reply with your resume and a brief cover letter explaining your experience with data entry, resume formatting, or project management tools like Asana.

title: Part-Time Remote Bookkeeper
description:
We're a landscape design and maintenance company based in Seattle, and we're looking for a bookkeeper who takes real ownership of the books — not just someone who processes transactions. This is a remote, part-time role built around two rhythms: keeping things accurate every day and closing the month clean by the 5th.

You'll work directly with ownership, live in QuickBooks Online Advanced, and help us build out new workflows as we grow (purchase orders, estimates, job costing, and more).

Hours: ~10–20 hrs/week (heavier during close)

Schedule: Flexible, but reachable during US Pacific Time business hours

Compensation: Please include your rate in your application

Start: As soon as possible



What You'll Do

Daily



Reconcile checking, credit cards, and loan accounts as transactions post — no letting it pile up

Code every transaction to the correct account, class, and location; fix miscoding before it compounds

Process vendor bills, match to POs, and keep AP aging current

Apply customer payments and keep AR aging clean

Record payroll journal entries and reconcile payroll liabilities



Monthly Close (target: delivered by the 5th)



Complete all reconciliations and coding before month-end cutoff

Review the P&L line-by-line against prior month; investigate and explain material variances

Clean up the balance sheet: resolve stale items, clear outstanding checks, reconcile every account

Post standard accruals (unpaid invoices, accrued payroll, interest, depreciation) and reverse prior-month entries on the 1st

Deliver a clean P&L, Balance Sheet, and Cash Flow Statement with a brief close memo



QuickBooks Online Advanced — you own it



Administer QBO Advanced: users, permissions, integrations, settings

Configure and roll out new workflows as we grow: Purchase Orders, Estimates, Progress Invoicing, Job Costing

Build custom reports and management dashboards

Document your processes so nothing lives only in your head





What We're Looking For



Must-haves:

3+ years of full-cycle bookkeeping with monthly close ownership

Expert-level QuickBooks Online Advanced — this is the job's core tool

Experience reconciling multiple bank, credit card, and loan accounts

Comfortable with accrual-basis accounting and standard month-end journal entries

Track record of closing books on time, consistently

Available and responsive during US Pacific Time hours



Nice-to-haves:

Background in landscaping, construction, or another field-service business

Experience with job costing or project-based billing

QBO ProAdvisor certification

Experience setting up Purchase Orders or Estimates in QBO from scratch

title: Real-Time Operations & Systems Assistant (Fast-Paced Role)
description:
We are a growing service business based in Australia looking for a highly responsive and proactive assistant to support daily operations.

This is NOT a traditional task-based VA role.

You will be working alongside a business owner who is on the road most of the day. Communication is frequent, fast, and often in real time. You must be comfortable receiving messages, voice notes, and instructions throughout the day and turning them into action quickly and accurately.

? Key Responsibilities:

• Managing incoming messages and responding promptly during working hours

• Converting voice notes into clear actions (quotes, job notes, replies, scheduling)

• Updating CRM systems (Tradify and Fergus)

• General admin support as required

• Keeping operations organised and running smoothly

???? Systems & Growth Focus:

The business has grown quickly and now requires proper systems behind the scenes.

You will act as a Systems Champion, helping to: • Create and document SOPs

• Identify inefficiencies and improve workflows

• Build structure and consistency into daily operations

• Support future growth by developing scalable systems

???? Onboarding & Development:

To ensure long-term success in the role, onboarding will include: • Learning internal processes through training videos and documented procedures

• Reviewing and understanding existing workflows and systems

• Engaging with selected business and systems-focused content (including audio/video materials) to align with how the business operates

You will be supported through this process, but initiative and self-driven learning are essential.

?? Communication Expectations (Critical):

• You must keep communication platforms open and actively monitored during your shift

• Messages should be acknowledged within 5–15 minutes

• If a task takes longer, you must provide an update

This role suits someone who enjoys being engaged and responsive throughout the day — not someone who prefers checking messages occasionally.

? Additional Requirement:

During the initial setup phase, you must be open to working overtime and weekends if required, as this phase may be intensive while systems are being built.

? Ideal Candidate:

• Highly responsive and reliable

• Comfortable working in a fast-paced, reactive environment

• Proactive and able to take initiative

• Strong written English and communication skills

• Tech-savvy and quick to learn new systems

• Interested in systems, organisation, and continuous improvement

???? To Apply, please answer:

What is your typical response time during working hours?

Have you worked in a fast-paced, real-time communication role before?

Do you have experience creating SOPs or improving systems?

Why does this type of role suit you?

title: Experienced Ecommerce Paid Media Specialist (Google + Meta)
description:

We’re hiring a senior paid media specialist who knows how to grow ecommerce brands, not just manage ad accounts.

Monitor account performance daily and make proactive changes to improve ROAS, CPA, MER, and revenue

Test creatives, landing pages, offers, audience structures, and bidding strategies

Work with our team on growth strategy, reporting, and account opportunities

Identify performance issues early and fix them fast

What We Need From You

Proven experience running ads for Shopify ecommerce brands

Deep working knowledge of Google Ads across Search, Shopping, Performance Max, and YouTube

Deep working knowledge of Meta Ads across prospecting, retargeting, dynamic product ads, and creative testing

Strong understanding of GA4, GTM, pixel setup, CAPI, product feeds, attribution, and conversion tracking

Proven ability to scale ecommerce ad accounts to larger budgets and higher sales volumes

Strong English and the ability to communicate strategy, results, and recommendations clearly

Able to work independently, think critically, and take ownership of results



You Must Be Able To Show

The largest monthly ad budget you have personally managed

Examples of accounts you have scaled to bigger budgets and bigger sales volumes

How you increased spend while maintaining or improving performance

The actions you personally took to drive growth

Clear understanding of the commercial side of ecommerce performance, not just platfor
trics

Experience with Klaviyo or
/SMS retargeting integrations

Experience managing multiple ecommerce brands or agency clients

Strong understanding of profitability, contribution margin, and customer acquisition economics



This Role Is For You If

You care about growth, revenue, and profitable scale

You can confidently manage larger budgets without losing control of performance

You can explain results clearly without fluff

You’ve genuinely helped ecommerce brands grow



This Role Is Not For You If

You’ve maintained campaigns but have not genuinely scaled budgets and sales



Why Join Us?

100% remote work

Paid sick days and annual leave

Performance-based incentives and regular pay reviews

Loyalty bonus for long-term tea
mbers

Career development and upskilling opportunities

Collaborative and supportive digital team culture



How To Apply

the largest monthly budget you have personally managed

what platforms were involved

the revenue outcome

title: Reels/Tik-Tok/Shorts Maker for Auto Detailing Company | Content Creator | SMM Assistant/Manager
description:
We are a growing auto detailing company in the United States looking for a creative and reliable Reels/TikTok/Shorts Maker, Content Creator, and SMM Assistant/Manager.



This role is focused on creating short-form video content for Instagram Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts,
, and other social media platforms. You will work with raw footage of cars, detailing jobs, before/after transformations, interior cleaning, ceramic coating, paint correction, polishing, customer reactions, and behind-the-scenes content.



We are looking for someone who can not only edit videos, but also help us plan content, research trends, create hooks, write captions, organize ideas, and build a consistent content system for our auto detailing brand.



Main Responsibilities:

- Edit short-form videos for Reels, TikTok, Shorts, and

- Turn raw detailing footage into engaging 15–45 second videos

- Create strong hooks for the first 1–3 seconds

- Add captions, subtitles, text overlays, music, sound effects, and simple effects

- Create before/after transformation videos

- Help create a weekly/monthly content plan

- Research trends, competitors, and content ideas

- Write captions, hashtags, and CTAs

- Prepare posts for publishing

- Organize raw files and edited content

- Help maintain a consistent brand style

- Suggest improvements based on content performance



Requirements:

- Experience editing Reels, TikToks, or YouTube Shorts

- Good understanding of hooks, pacing, retention, captions, and trends

- Experience with CapCut, Premiere Pro, Final Cut, DaVinci Resolve, Canva, or similar tools

- Ability to create content ideas, not just edit videos

- Good written English

- Strong attention to detail

- Reliable internet connection

- Ability to follow instructions and meet deadlines

- Interest in cars, detailing, luxury vehicles, or local businesses is a plus



Nice to Have:

- Experience managing social media accounts

- Experience creating content calendars

- Experience with Meta Business Suite or scheduling tools

- Experience with local service businesses

- Basic understanding of social media analytics

- Experience using AI tools for hooks, captions, and content ideas



This position may start part-time, around 10–20 hours per week, with the opportunity to grow into a long-term full-time role.



Next Steps:



- After you apply, we will review your application and send selected candidates a short form to complete.

- The form will ask about your experience, portfolio, editing tools, content planning skills, availability.

- After reviewing the form responses, we will invite selected candidates to complete a small paid test task: creating one short-form video from our raw auto detailing footage.

- After the paid test, we will choose several candidates for the next stage, which may include a trial period, ongoing video editing work, social media management support, or helping us create a content strategy for our auto detailing brand.



We are looking for someone who can potentially grow with us long-term. Applications without video examples will not be considered.

title: Cold Email + LinkedIn Outreach Specialist
description:

 + LinkedIn Outreach Specialist

- Examples of cold
 sequences you wrote.

- Examples of lead lists or targeting criteria you built.

- References, case studies, or client/employer results.

-
 deliverability, inbox warmup, domain setup, or campaign testing.

 or LinkedIn outreach?

title: Amazon Category Specialist / Amazon Brand Manager
description:
About the role



We are seeking a highly analytical and results-driven Amazon Category Specialist to own the growth, profitability, and overall performance of assigned product categories on Amazon. This role requires hands-on experience across listing optimization, ranking, retail media, pricing strategy, and cross-functional coordination to drive sustainable revenue and margin growth. 



What you'll do



Own category performance including revenue, profitability, and key KPIs 

Build and execute quarterly and annual category growth plans 

Optimize product detail pages (titles, descriptions, images, A+ content, and storefront) to improve conversion rates

title: Director of Recruiting & Hiring for US Digital Agency (Part-Time to Full-Time, $300 to $1,000 per month)
description:
We're looking for someone who loves finding great people and knows how to build a hiring machine from scratch. You'll own the entire recruiting and hiring process for our agency and eventually for our clients too. This role starts part-time (20 hrs/wk) and grows to full-time as you prove yourself. If you're the kind of person who gets excited about building talent pipelines, screening candidates, and turning hiring into a repeatable system, this is your role.



---



**Background:**

Web Launch Pros is a US-based digital agency that builds websites, CRMs, and marketing automation for local service businesses (HVAC, landscaping, construction, law firms, med spas). We have a small but growing remote team across the Philippines and the US. We are scaling fast and need someone who can keep up with hiring demand across multiple roles and verticals. You will work directly with the founder and report into leadership.



---



**Detailed Responsibilities:**



1. Own the full recruiting cycle for all open roles: write and post job listings on OnlineJobs.ph, Indeed, and other platforms. Screen applications, manage candidate pipelines, and move qualified candidates through each stage of our automated hiring funnel (application form, English proficiency test, AI-powered interview, skills assessment). You are responsible for keeping the pipeline full and moving.



2. Build and maintain candidate screening systems. We use an automated multi-step funnel that includes application scoring, English testing, AI avatar interviews, and skills assessments. You will manage, monitor, and improve this funnel. When something breaks or a stage has low pass-through rates, you diagnose and fix it. You will track funnel metrics the same way a marketing team tracks lead conversion.



3. Source and recruit candidates proactively. Do not wait for applications to come in. Search candidate databases on OnlineJobs.ph, LinkedIn, and other sourcing channels. Reach out to strong candidates directly. Build a bench of pre-qualified talent for roles we hire repeatedly (virtual assistants, CRM builders, sales reps). Maintain a talent database in Notion.



4. Manage onboarding logistics for new hires. Coordinate account setup, tool access, contractor agreements, first-week schedules, and SOP assignments. Ensure every new hire has a smooth first week with clear expectations and the resources they need to succeed. Hand off to the appropriate team lead once onboarding is complete.



5. Recruit for client projects as the agency grows. As we expand, you will also source and hire contract talent on behalf of our clients (sales reps, appointment setters, admin VAs). You will manage these candidate pipelines separately and ensure client-facing hires meet our quality bar.



---



**Required Technical Skills and Experience:**



- At least 2 years of experience in recruiting, talent acquisition, or HR operations. You must have hands-on experience writing job descriptions, screening resumes, conducting interviews, and managing candidate pipelines. Agency or BPO recruiting experience is a strong advantage.

- Experience using OnlineJobs.ph as a recruiter or hiring manager. You understand how the platform works, how to search the candidate database, how to write listings that attract quality applicants, and how to filter efficiently.

- Proficiency with project management and database tools (Notion preferred). You will maintain candidate tracking databases, build hiring dashboards, and manage task lists for each open role. If you have not used Notion, you must be a fast learner with similar tools (Airtable, ClickUp, Trello).



---



**Soft Skills:**



- Relentlessly organized. You manage multiple open roles at once without dropping candidates or missing follow-ups.

- Strong written English. Every job listing, outreach message, and candidate communication you write reflects well on the company.

- Self-starter who does not wait for instructions. You see a gap in the pipeline and fill it before being asked.

- Data-driven. You track metrics, spot bottlenecks, and make decisions based on numbers, not gut feelings.

- High judgment on people. You can quickly assess whether a candidate is worth advancing or not, and you are comfortable making that call.



---



**Basic Skills:**



- Excellent written English (you will write job postings, outreach messages, and candidate evaluations daily)

- Conversational spoken English (you will coordinate with US-based leadership on Slack and Zoom)

- Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Drive)

- Slack for daily communication

- Zoom for meetings and candidate coordination

- Comfortable learning new tools quickly (our CRM platform, AI screening tools, form builders)



---



**Desired Technical Skills and Experience:**



- Experience with applicant tracking systems (ATS) or building hiring funnels with automation tools

- Familiarity with HeyGen, Loom, or other video-based screening/interview tools

- Experience recruiting sales representatives or cold callers specifically (understanding what makes a good phone-based hire)



---



**Work Schedule and Holidays:**



- Starts at 20 hours per week (part-time), with a clear path to 40 hours per week (full-time) based on performance and hiring volume

- Schedule aligned with US Mountain Time business hours (flexible on exact hours within that window)

- Manila Time equivalent: evenings/nights PHT (approximately 10:00 PM to 7:00 AM PHT depending on schedule chosen)

- Probationary period: 6 months

- After probation: 3 vacation days + 3 sick days per year

- Holidays observed: most Filipino holidays except All Saints Day and All Souls Day



---



**Salary:**



$6 - $8 per hour USD depending on experience. At 20 hours per week, this is approximately $480 - $640 per month. At full-time (40 hrs/wk), this is approximately $960 - $1,280 per month.



---



**Perks and Benefits:**



- 13th month pay after probationary period

- Cash equivalent for unused leave days

- Performance bonuses tied to hiring speed and quality metrics

- Access to premium recruiting tools and AI screening technology paid for by the company



---



**Training Provided:**



- Full training on our hiring funnel, screening systems, and candidate evaluation rubrics

- Training on our CRM platform and internal tools

- SOPs for every stage of the recruiting process

- Direct mentorship from the founder during onboarding



---



**Career Potential:**



This role has a clear growth path. You start part-time managing internal hiring. As you prove yourself, the role grows to full-time and expands to include client recruiting. Long-term, you could lead an entire recruiting division that serves both our agency and our clients. Top performers receive raises every 6 months based on measurable results. If you want to build something, not just fill a seat, this is the role for you.



---



**How to Apply:**



Do NOT use the OnlineJobs.ph apply button.



Instead, send an
 to 
 with the following:



1. Subject line must include the words "I Find Talent" (applications without this exact phrase will not be reviewed)



2. Attach your resume



3. In the body of your
, answer these two questions:

   - What is your experience recruiting on OnlineJobs.ph specifically? How many hires have you made through the platform?

   - Describe one time you improved a hiring process or solved a recruiting bottleneck. What was the problem, what did you do, and what was the result?



4. Include a 2-minute Loom video (or similar screen recording) where you walk through how you would search for and evaluate a "GHL Technical Builder" candidate on OnlineJobs.ph. Show your screen, explain your search strategy, and talk through how you would d
 which candidates to shortlist.



Applications missing the Loom video or the subject line phrase will not be reviewed. We respond to all qualified applicants within 5 business days.
