title: Full-Stack PWA Developer — Health & Wellness App
description:
We are building a mobile-first PWA (Progressive Web App) for a women's health and wellness brand. The app includes daily check-ins, habit tracking, AI-assisted task management, a structured weekly workflow, milestone and reward mechanics, and a subscription paywall.



Design and wireframes are currently in progress. The developer will begin foundational build work immediately and advance in parallel with the designer — working slightly behind the design pace as each section is approved and handed off. You must be comfortable working in a structured, phased handoff process rather than waiting for everything to be complete before starting.



What this role covers

This is a full-time build role covering the complete lifecycle of the app:



Phase 1 — Build: Full PWA build from approved wireframes, phased in parallel with design

Phase 2 — Beta: Support beta testing, triage feedback, and integrate changes rapidly

Phase 3 — Launch (Version 1): Assist with all technical details of getting the app live and fully operational

Phase 4 — Version 2: Add additional features and improvements to reach v2 quickly after launch

Ongoing: Continued maintenance, reliability, and feature support post-launch

As a bonus, if the app can be structured or built in a way that makes a future App Store and/or Google Play submission straightforward, that is a strong advantage — please speak to this in your application.



What you'll build

You must have demonstrated experience with all of the following:



PWA development (installable on mobile home screen, push notifications, offline handling)

External relational database setup and architecture (Xano or Supabase preferred)

Stripe Subscriptions integration — trials, coupons, billing lifecycle, lapsed account handling

AI API integration (prompt-based features, structured output handling)

User authentication with separated identity and analytics data layers

Push notifications +
 reminders (SendGrid) + optional SMS (Twilio)

CSS and/or Lottie animations triggered by app logic events

Web Speech API or equivalent voice input integration

Product analytics wiring from day one (Mixpanel or PostHog)

Front-end: Bubble (PWA) or a lightweight web framework — you must be able to advise on the best option and provide a detailed quote for each



Ongoing responsibilities

Troubleshooting and bug resolution

Mobile responsiveness across devices

Basic security practices and data backups



You must be

Very skilled technically

Excellent in written English

Strong on attention to detail

A clear, reliable communicator

Have at least 5 years of direct, relevant experience

Comfortable working in an active, evolving build environment alongside a designer

Willing to sign an NDA with assignment of all intellectual property



Hours & communication

Preferred compensation is per-phase project pricing — please provide a breakdown by phase in your application. If proposing hourly, the minimum is 45 hours/week.

Must be available for a 20–30 minute Microsoft Teams call, Monday–Friday, sometime between 7:00 am – 5:00 pm AST

Remaining hours are flexible as long as work is completed on time

Must provide daily updates and weekly project summaries



To apply

Please include all of the following — incomplete applications will not be reviewed:



Links to 2–3 PWAs or complex web apps you have built (describe your specific role on each)

Your experience with each technology listed above — be specific

Whether you would recommend Bubble or a custom framework for this type of app, and why

Your experience working in parallel with a designer on an active build — how do you handle handoffs and scope changes mid-build?

Your thoughts on structuring the app for a potential future App Store / Google Play submission

A proposed per-phase price breakdown, or your hourly rate if that is your preference

Include the word rain somewhere in your message so we know you read the full post carefully

Proactively suggesting better ways to structure the app, automate tasks, and improve reliability over time

title: Cold Caller / Sales Closer for US Digital Agency
description:
Cold Caller / Sales Closer for US Digital Agency



**Job Description:**



If you can find leads, close them, and collect customer payment, your earning potential here is very high.



We're a US-based digital agency that builds websites, CRMs, and marketing automation for local service businesses (HVAC, landscaping, construction, law firms, med spas). We need a part-time sales closer with perfect English who can find their own leads, get them on the phone, close the deal, collect payment, and keep clients happy long-term.



**Detailed Responsibilities:**



1. Research and build your own prospect lists of local service businesses in the US using Google, LinkedIn, Google Maps, and other online tools. You find the leads, you own the pipeline.

2. Cold call business owners, run a discovery conversation to understand their pain points, present our services, handle objections, and close the deal on the same call or a scheduled follow-up.

3. Collect payment information from new clients and ensure a smooth handoff to our onboarding team. You stay the point of contact through the first 30 days.

4. Send a daily activity report: calls made, conversations had, appointments set, deals closed, revenue collected.

5. Maintain ongoing contact with existing clients to identify upsell opportunities into higher-tier packages, generating recurring commission for yourself.



**Required Technical Skills and Experience (at least 1 year):**



1. Cold calling and outbound sales to US-based businesses (B2B, not B2C)

2. Full sales cycle experience: prospecting, setting, closing, and collecting payment

3. Lead scraping and list building using Google, LinkedIn, Google Maps, or similar tools



**Soft Skills:**



We need someone who thrives on rejection and keeps dialing. You will go far if you are:



- Relentless and self-motivated. Nobody is going to tell you to pick up the phone.

- A natural conversationalist who sounds like a trusted advisor, not a telemarketer

- Coachable. We have scripts and frameworks, but we want someone who can adapt them to real conversations.

- Honest and straightforward. We do not oversell or mislead business owners.



**Basic Skills:**



You must have near-native or native-level spoken English. US-based business owners will be your only audience, and if your English is not excellent on the phone, this role is not a fit. No exceptions.



You also need to be comfortable with:



- Google Sheets or Excel for tracking your pipeline

- Gmail and Google Calendar

- Communication tools like Slack and Zoom

- CRM software (we will train you on ours)



**Desired Technical Skills and Experience:**



These are not required but will give you priority:



1. Experience selling digital marketing services (websites, SEO, CRM, lead generation)

2. Familiarity with any CRM platform (HubSpot, Salesforce, or similar)

3. Experience with cold
 outreach tools or dialers (like PhoneBurner, Mojo, OpenPhone, etc.)



**Work Schedule:**



This is a part-time position, approximately 20 hours per week. You must be available to make calls during US business hours (8am to 5pm Mountain Time, which is 10pm to 7am Manila Time). You choose which days and how many hours, but calls must happen when US business owners are in their offices.



**Perks and Benefits:**



- Uncapped commissions. There is no ceiling on what you can earn.

- Recurring commissions on upsells to your existing clients

- Full sales training, call scripts, objection handling frameworks, and recorded examples provided

- The more you build, the more you earn from upsells without making new calls.

- Opportunity to move into a full-time Sales Manager role as we scale



**Training Provided:**



You will receive full training on our services, pricing, CRM system, sales scripts, and objection handling playbook. We also provide recorded examples of successful sales calls so you can hear exactly what works. You do not need to know our industry on day one, but you do need to know how to sell.



**Career Potential:**



This starts as a part-time commission role. Top performers will be offered a base salary plus commission and the opportunity to manage a team of sales reps. Our goal is to build a sales department, and the person who proves themselves first will lead it.



**How to Apply:**



When applying,
 Tanner directly 
 sure to include your name and "I Close Deals" in the subject heading.



In your application, also include:



1. A 2-minute voice recording (use a free account on 
) where you pretend you are calling a landscaping company owner and pitching them on a new website. We do not care if it is perfect. We want to hear your English, your energy, and your ability to think on your feet.

2. A short paragraph explaining the biggest deal you have ever closed (amount, product/service, how you found the lead).

3. A short paragraph about why you are interested in working here at a commission-only position with unlimited growth potential.



Applications without the Loom video will not be reviewed.

title: Amazon & Wal-Mart Seller Central VA
description:
Amazon & Walmart Seller Central Virtual Assistant

Remote  •  Full-Time or Part-Time  •  Philippines-Based

Position Overview



We are a US-based manufacturer with brands of tire sealant products serving both consumer (ATV/UTV, lawn equipment, cycling) and commercial (fleet/industrial) markets. We sell primarily through Amazon FBA/FBM and Walmart Seller Central, and we're looking for a sharp, detail-oriented VA who can own our marketplace operations day-to-day.

This is a hands-on role — not a general admin position. You'll be working directly inside Seller Central accounts for both platforms and are expected to know your way around without hand-holding.



Position Type: Remote, Independent Contractor

Hours: Part-time to start (20–30 hrs/week), with potential for full-time

Schedule: Must have overlap with US Central Time (CST) business hours

Pay: Competitive, based on experience — paid bi-monthly via Wise

Start Date: ASAP



Key Responsibilities



Amazon Seller Central (FBA & FBM)

• Monitor account health dashboard daily — catch suppressed listings, policy warnings, and performance alerts before they escalate

• Manage FBA inbound shipments: create shipment plans, coordinate with our warehouse, track inventory in transit

• Handle FBM order management: confirm orders, print labels, track shipments, resolve exceptions

• File reimbursement claims for lost/damaged FBA inventory using established workflows

• Open and manage Seller Support cases — follow up relentlessly until resolved

• Monitor and respond to customer messages within Amazon's 24-hour window

• Flag unauthorized sellers, listing hijackers, or Buy Box issues for escalation

• Maintain listing accuracy — titles, bullets, backend keywords, images — across both brands

• Pull and organize weekly performance reports (sales, returns, fees, Buy Box %)



Walmart Seller Central

• Manage item setup and listing maintenance in Walmart Seller Central

• Monitor order management and fulfillment status

• Handle Walmart support cases and policy compliance issues

• Track performance scorecard metrics and flag any issues proactively

• Coordinate with internal team on inventory availability and fulfillment readiness



Reporting & Communication

• Provide a brief daily or weekly status update (written — Slack or
)

• Flag urgent issues immediately — do not wait for scheduled check-ins

• Maintain a running case log and task tracker (Google Sheets or similar)

• Document processes as you learn them — we value SOPs



Requirements



Must-Have Experience

• Minimum 2 years working inside Amazon Seller Central — FBA and FBM both

• Direct experience filing reimbursement claims and managing Seller Support cases

• Comfortable with Amazon account health management and policy compliance

• Experience with Walmart Seller Central (or strong willingness to learn quickly)

• Proficient in Google Sheets or Excel for tracking and reporting

• Excellent written English — you'll be communicating with customers and internal team



Bonus Skills (Not Required)

• Experience with Helium 10, DataDive, SmartScout, SellerBoard, Sellerise or Shopkeeper

• Familiarity with Amazon Brand Registry and A+ Content management

• Experience with WooCommerce, Shopify or other e-commerce platforms

• Background in consumer products, automotive, outdoor, or lawn/garden categories

• Bilingual — English/Spanish a plus



Who You Are



• You take ownership — if something's broken, you fix it or escalate it. You don't wait to be asked.

• You are proactive about account health — you spot problems before they become suspensions.

• You are organized and document your work — we're a lean team and need to trust what's in writing.

• You communicate clearly and on time — no radio silence.

• You learn fast — Amazon and Walmart update policies constantly and you stay current.

• You treat our brands like they're your own — because the work you do directly impacts our revenue.



How to Apply



Please send the following to us through OnlineJobs.ph or directly via
:



• A brief intro about yourself and your Amazon/Walmart experience

• A specific example of an Amazon Seller Central problem you solved (account health issue, reimbursement case, suppressed listing, etc.)

• Your availability and preferred hours

• Your expected rate (USD per hour or monthly)



Applications without a specific example of Seller Central experience will not be considered. We want to see that you've actually done this work — not just read about it.

title: Head of Growth – High-Ticket B2B Financial Services (Full-Time or Part-Time)
description:
Head of Growth – High-Ticket B2B Financial Services (Full-Time or Part-Time)



We are looking for a Head of Growth to own our lead generation and client acquisition strategy end to end.



The Role

This is not just a task execution role. We want a strategic growth leader who will identify opportunities, build the plan, execute it and report on what is working. You will be the driving force behind how Simic Financial attracts and converts new clients.

Your job is simple in concept and difficult in practice: generate a consistent pipeline of qualified leads from Australian businesses doing $1M to $50M in revenue that need Virtual CFO Advisory, bookkeeping or M&A support.

You will have direct access to the founder and the autonomy to move fast. We are open to full-time or part-time depending on the right candidate, and we will pay accordingly. This is a generous base plus commission structure designed to reward someone who delivers.





What You Will Own

Overall growth strategy and execution across all channels

- Meta/Facebook advertising (campaign strategy, audience targeting, creative direction, optimisation and reporting)

- LinkedIn specialist campaigns (organic content strategy, outreach sequences, paid campaigns, audience building)

- Audience growth across all platforms to build long-term brand authority in the Australian SME market

- Event strategy (webinars, roundtables, partnerships, in-person events) to generate warm leads and referral opportunities

- Funnel performance (landing pages, lead magnets,
 nurture sequences, conversion rate optimisation)

- Referral partner channel development and activation

- Cold Calling if we determine that to be the right move?

-
 Campaign management to grow a database of engaged potential leads

Any other channel or tactic you believe will move the needle. We want someone who brings ideas, not just follows a playbook.



What We Are Looking For



- Proven experience generating leads and revenue for high-ticket B2B services. Ideally in financial services, consulting, coaching businesses or other high-value subscription/retainer models.

- Deep understanding of how business owners in the $1M to $50M range think, buy and make decisions. You know that selling a $5,000+ per month service is fundamentally different from selling a product.

- Strong paid media skills, particularly Meta and LinkedIn advertising.

- Experience building and managing outbound campaigns on LinkedIn (organic and paid).

- Ability to think strategically and execute operationally. You can develop the plan and also do the work.

- Comfort working autonomously with minimal oversight. You push, you test, you report, you iterate.

- Excellent written and spoken English. You will be creating or directing content, outreach messages and ad copy targeting senior Australian business owners.

- Data-driven mindset. You track everything, know your numbers and make decisions based on performance.



Bonus Points



Experience with GoHighLevel (GHL) or similar CRM and marketing automation platforms

Copywriting ability for ads, landing pages and
 sequences

Experience marketing to Australian or similar Western B2B markets

Understanding of financial services, accounting or advisory businesses

Video or creative production skills for ad content (not essential as we have a video editor, but knowing what looks good and what will convert will be a helpful skill)





About Simic Financial

Simic Financial is one of Australia's fastest growing Virtual CFO Advisory and full-service bookkeeping firms. We work with business owners and founders running companies between $1M and $50M in annual revenue who are scaling and need serious financial leadership without the cost of a full-time CFO.

Our core services are Virtual CFO Advisory, bookkeeping and M&A support. These are high-ticket, relationship-driven engagements. Our clients are not shopping on price. They are looking for a trusted advisor who will sit beside them and help them make better decisions.





Compensation

We will pay a strong base rate for the right person, well above market for the Philippines. On top of that, we offer a generous commission structure tied to leads generated and clients acquired. If you perform, you will be compensated highly. This is a role where the upside is real.



Full-time or part-time. We are flexible on structure for the right candidate.

To Apply - Send exactly the following:

1. A short summary of your experience generating leads for high-ticket B2B services, including the industries and price points you have worked with

2. Two or three specific examples of growth campaigns you have led, with results (leads generated, cost per lead, revenue impact or similar metrics)

3. What you would do in your first 30 days if you started this role tomorrow

4. Your base rate expectation in USD (hourly or monthly) and preferred working arrangement (full-time or part-time), and your availability to start



We are not looking for a generalist who runs ads. We are looking for THE BEST Growth operator in the Philippines who can take ownership of our pipeline and build something that compounds. If that is you, we want to hear from you.

title: Lead Monetization & Revenue Ops Manager (Remote + Performance Bonuses)
description:
Description:



We are a fast-growing lead generation company in the solar and home services space generating high volumes of inbound leads daily.



Right now, our biggest opportunity is not more traffic — it’s maximizing the revenue from the leads we already generate.



We are looking for a Lead Monetization & Revenue Operations Manager whose sole focus is:



???? Making sure every lead gets sold, routed correctly, and generates maximum revenue



What You’ll Be Responsible For:



Ensure 100% lead monetization (no unsold leads)

Add and manage direct buyers, backup buyers, and rev share partners

Optimize lead routing logic (Lead Prosper or similar systems)

Fix issues related to:

Buyer rejections

Missing fields

Integration errors

Monitor buyer accounts:

Balances

Auto-recharge

Paused campaigns

Work with tracking systems (ClickFlare, UTMs, postbacks)

Identify revenue leaks and fix them fast

Report daily on:

Sold vs unsold leads

Revenue per lead

Issues affecting monetization



What Success Looks Like (KPIs):



Increase % of leads sold

Increase revenue per lead

Reduce “no buyer available” to near zero

Improve routing efficiency and delivery rate



Requirements:



Experience with:

Lead gen networks, CPL, or affiliate marketing

Lead routing systems (Lead Prosper, Boberdoo, or similar)

Strong analytical thinking (can diagnose problems quickly)

Understanding of:

Buyer behavior

CPL / Rev Share models

Basic tracking knowledge:

UTMs

Postbacks

Funnel tracking

Strong ownership mindset (not task-based, outcome-based)



Compensation:



Competitive base pay (depending on experience)

Performance bonuses tied to revenue improvement

Long-term growth opportunity into Head of Revenue Ops



Instructions to Candidate: (Copy & Paste)



You have 10 minutes max. Keep answers short and direct.



Scenario:



You’re managing a lead gen system and notice the following:



300 leads show “No buyer available”

1,000+ leads are rejected by buyers

Some leads are not being delivered due to missing fields

Questions:



1. What are the first 3 things you would check or fix immediately?



2. If a buyer is rejecting a large number of leads, what are 3 possible reasons why?



3. How would you increase revenue from the same exact leads without increasing traffic?



4. A buyer keeps running out of balance and pausing. What would you implement to fix this permanently?



5. Bonus (optional):

If you had to improve revenue by 20% in 30 days, what would your plan be?

title: Backend Developer (Node.js / Firebase) – Part-Time / Full-Time | Remote
description:
We are seeking a Backend Developer to support and enhance our existing applications running in a Node.js and Firebase environment on Google Cloud Platform (GCP). In this role, you will help maintain live systems, introduce new functionality, and ensure the backend infrastructure continues to operate efficiently and securely.

- Build and maintain RESTful APIs, cloud functions, and serverless components

- Evaluate system architecture and propose improvements when needed

- Monitor and improve system stability, performance, and security

- Handle deployments and maintain CI/CD pipelines and version control processes

- Work with the outgoing developer to ensure a smooth project transition

- Deliver ongoing updates, feature enhancements, and production support



Required Qualifications;

- 5+ years of backend development experience

- 3+ years of hands-on experience with Node.js and Firebase

- Demonstrated experience building and maintaining REST APIs and serverless backend systems

Preferred Experience:

- Familiarity with additional GCP services such as Cloud Run, Pub/Sub, or Cloud Storage

- Experience working with financial or fintech applications involving secure systems and transaction processing

- Experience implementing secure authentication and authorization methods including OAuth or JWT

- Exposure to Terraform or similar infrastructure-as-code tools

- Familiarity with API documentation tools such as Swagger or OpenAPI

Flexible working hours between 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM Philippine Time

title: Ad Video Editor with AI experience
description:
We are an online education business building a high-velocity ad creation machine.



This role is for a video editor who understands advertising — not just editing tools, but how attention is captured, held, and converted in today’s market.



Our ideal candidate must understand:

What a hook is

Why the first 1–3 seconds matter

How visuals, pacing, text, and storytelling work together to stop the scroll



You will be editing primarily short-form video ads, along with supporting YouTube and educational content.



Core Responsibilities

- Edit short-form video ads optimized for performance (Meta, YouTube, social)

- Create strong visual hooks using pacing, framing, motion, and text

- Produce multiple variations of winning ads

- Apply storytelling principles to promotional, educational, and entertaining content

- Edit longer-form YouTube and educational videos as needed

- Deliver assets in multiple formats (9:16, 1:1, 16:9)

- Use motion graphics and text animation templates (MotionArray + provided assets)

- Manage reviews and feedback via 
 or Dropbox Relay and Google Drive

- Maintain a clean, efficient remote workflow



Required Skills & Experience (Non-Negotiable)



Applicants must meet all of the following:



Proven experience editing short-form video ads

Clear understanding of what makes a compelling hook

Strong storytelling instincts (pacing, escalation, payoff)

Proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro

Working knowledge of CapCut for fast iteration

Active experience using AI tools in video production, such as:

Caption generation

B-roll generation or enhancement

Audio cleanup

Visual enhancement

Workflow acceleration

(You don’t need to use every tool — but AI must be part of your regular workflow.)

Experience working with 4K footage (Sony cinema cameras, iPhone)

Comfortable using motion graphics and text animation templates

Proficient in Google Workspace (Drive, Docs, Sheets)

Reliable, organized, and able to meet deadlines consistently



Additional Required Qualifications (Non-Negotiable)

Fluency in English at a C2 (Mastery) level

You must be able to communicate clearly and confidently in spoken and written English.

This role involves nuanced feedback, storytelling, and real-time collaboration.

If you are not at a C2 / Mastery level, please do not apply.



Availability during Pacific Time (PT) working hours

You must be available for scheduled meetings and real-time collaboration during our core working hours (Pacific Time zone).

Exact meeting cadence will be light, but availability during PT hours is required.



Candidate must not be engaged in other contract work, and be available full-time.



You must have examples of your work available to share.

Applications without relevant samples will not be considered.



Bonus Skills (Nice to Have)

Background in creative writing or scripting

Familiarity with Meta ad performance concepts

Media buying or ad account management experience

Understanding of ad fatigue and creative testing



You will be executing within a defined ad system with clear direction and performance feedback.



How We Work

We provide regular, clear creative direction and examples provided

Emphasis on speed, volume, and iteration

Minimal meetings; asynchronous collaboration

Performance feedback tied to real ad results

Opportunity to grow responsibility and impact over time



Application Instructions (Important)



To apply, please include all of the following:

A brief description of your experience editing short-form video ads

Your explanation of what makes a strong hook (in your own words)

Links to examples of your ad or short-form video work

A list of AI tools you actively use in your editing workflow

Your preferred workflow

(proxies, shared drives, Team Projects, 
, etc.)



Estimated turnaround time for:

1-minute short-form ad

5-minute YouTube video

60-minute podcast (Zoom)



Please begin your response with the code: #4656



Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be reviewed.



Compensation



Hourly rate is flexible and based on experience.

We are willing to pay above-market rates for a high-performing editor.



Why This Role Matters

This editor will play a core role in building our ad creation engine.

If you enjoy blending creativity, storytelling, and performance — this is a fun opportunity!

title: Marketing Systems Specialist (GoHighLevel + Meta Ads)
description:
Marketing Systems Specialist (GoHighLevel + Meta Ads)



Location: (Remote)

Type: Full-Time or Long-Term Contract

Industry: Online Education



We are a U.S.-based online education company seeking a highly detail-oriented Marketing Systems Specialist to implement and manage our marketing infrastructure.



The founder of the business owns all strategy, messaging, and funnel architecture.

Our Marketing Systems Specialist will serve in execution, system building, optimization, and reporting.



This is not a strategy or creative direction role.

This is a systems and implementation role.



English Fluency Requirement:

C2-level mastery of English (CEFR equivalent) is required.



You must be able to:

Communicate fluently in written and spoken English

Participate confidently in weekly Zoo
etings

Write professional internal communications

Understand advanced marketing terminology



Core Responsibilities:

GoHighLevel Implementation & Automation

Build funnels inside GoHighLevel based on provided wireframes

Implement advanced
 workflows (segmentation, tagging, conditional logic)

Build evergreen webinar automations with timed access logic

Set up SMS and internal notification automations

QA all workflows before launch

Troubleshoot technical issues

Manage our Meta Ads account

Publish ads to our account based on creatives given

Duplicate winning ads to new interest groups for testing

Scale up ad spend or scale down or kill ad based on performance

Create and manage our Google Ads account

Take creatives given from our team to launch in Google Ads



Meta Ads Implementation & Monitoring:

Launch campaigns based on provided structure

Set up tracking (Pixel, CAPI, UTMs)

Manage split tests

Monitor performance metrics daily

Provide organized weekly performance reports

Alert leadership to performance shifts



Google Ads:

Launch Google Ad account

Launch and scale ads as given

Provide reporting on performance metrics



Systems & Reporting:

Maintain tagging hygiene and automation structure

Audit workflows for efficiency and accuracy

Build and maintain reporting dashboards

Document systems clearly

Ensure tracking integrity across platforms



Required Experience:

Proven hands-on experience building funnels in GoHighLevel

Advanced workflow automation experience in GHL

Experience launching and managing Meta Ads campaigns

Experience launching and managing Google Ads

Understanding of tracking fundamentals (Pixel, CAPI, UTMs)

Working familiarity with Kajabi

Experience supporting webinar funnels (live or evergreen)

Experience using Zapier or similar tools

If your experience is limited to editing templates or following SOPs without independent implementation, this role is not a fit.



Ideal Candidate:

Highly organized and systems-oriented

Detail-focused

Calm under pressure

Proactive about reporting

Comfortable taking direction

Focused on execution excellence

Able to own a system and 



Compensation:

Competitive and based on experience and demonstrated capability.

This is not an entry-level role.



How to Apply



Submit:

A brief written summary of your relevant experience

Examples of GoHighLevel funnels you’ve built

Description of Meta campaigns you’ve managed

Your expected monthly compensation

Include #4656 at the top of your application



Thank you so much for taking the time to fill out this application, and we look forward to hearing from you!

title: Join Our Growing Team — Accounting & Finance Specialist (AP/AR)
description:
Are you a sharp, detail-driven accounting professional who thrives in a fast-paced environment and takes pride in keeping the financial engine running smoothly? If you love bringing order to complexity and want to be a valued part of a team that actually appreciates your work — we want to hear from you.



We're looking for an enthusiastic and experienced AP/AR Specialist to join our team and play a key role in the financial health of our business. This is more than just a numbers job — it's an opportunity to make a real impact, grow with a supportive company, and build something meaningful.



What You'll Own

• Full-cycle Accounts Payable — vendor invoices, purchase orders, payment processing, expense reporting, billing disputes, and vendor relations

• Full-cycle Accounts Receivable — invoicing, payment follow-up, reconciliation, credit checks, collections, and credit management

• Weekly Cash Flow Management based on AP/AR activity

• Weekly, Monthly, and Quarterly admin and financial reports

• Supporting the development of internal controls, policies, and procedures

• General administrative support to keep operations running seamlessly



What You Bring

• 5+ years of accounting experience (AP/AR focus strongly preferred)

• QuickBooks proficiency — this is a must

• Strong Microsoft Excel skills

• Internet savvy and comfortable in a digital-first environment

• 
 experience is very important. 

• Excellent communication skills — both written 
) and verbal (phone)

• Background in distribution or import/export is a bonus

• A sharp, analytical mind with solid math skills

• The ability to multitask and stay calm in a fast-moving environment



What We Offer

• A part-time role with real potential to grow into a full-time position

• Competitive compensation that reflects your experience and value

• A supportive, collaborative team that sees you as more than just a hire

• A workplace where your contributions are recognized and appreciated



How to Apply

If you meet the qualifications above, we'd love to get to know you! Please send the following to the
 listed in this posting:

1. Your current resume



2. A 2–3 minute video answering these five questions:

1. Tell us about yourself and why you're interested in this role

2. What is your ideal work environment?

3. What are your strengths?

4. What is one area that you would like to improve?

5. Where do you see yourself in five years?



Please apply only if you have 5+ years of accounting experience. We appreciate every application and look forward to finding our next great tea
mber!



We can't wait to meet you.

title: Development & Digital Marketing Specialist
description:
Development and Digital Marketing Specialist



Work Hours: Mon-Fri, 20-30 hours per week. Shift may be required to start as early as 4AM PH Time



About the Firm:

Our immigration law firm specializes in providing expert legal services to individuals, families, and businesses navigating the complexities of U.S. immigration law. We are a dedicated team of professionals committed to delivering top-quality support and guidance to our clients.



Position Overview:

The Business Development & Digital Marketing Specialist is responsible for expanding the company’s online presence and driving business growth through digital marketing, networking, lead generation, and sales initiatives. This role focuses on building relationships with potential clients and business partners, managing online platforms and social media, creating advertising campaigns, and converting leads into clients.



Other Skills / Requirements:

•Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business Administration, Communications, or a related field (or equivalent work experience).

•Proven experience in business development, sales, digital marketing, or lead generation.

•Strong understanding of online marketing platforms, social media management, and digital advertising (e.g.,
, LinkedIn, Google Ads, or similar platforms).

•Experience in B2B and B2P networking, client outreach, and relationship building.

•Demonstrated ability to generate, track, and convert leads into clients or business opportunities.

•Excellent communication skills.

•Ability to manage multiple campaigns, leads, and priorities in a fast-paced environment.

•Experience working with professional services, legal, immigration, or consulting firms is an advantage but not required.

•Must be knowledgeable in google SEO and with sales experience.



Duties:

•Prepare, implement, and oversee online, B2B, and B2P networking strategies to generate new business opportunities.

•Create, manage, and optimize digital advertisements across online platforms, websites, and social media channels.

•Manage and maintain the company’s social media accounts, ensuring consistent branding, engagement, and content posting.

•Develop and execute lead generation strategies to attract potential clients and partner businesses with the help of the marketing and sales team.

•Oversee the tracking, monitoring, and reporting of leads, conversions, and campaign performance using appropriate tools and reports.

•Reach out to, engage, and build relationships with prospective clients, partners, and businesses through
, social platforms, and other outreach channels.

•Coordinate with internal teams to ensure accurate messaging, branding, and alignment with company goals.

•Oversee the maintenance updated database of leads, contacts, and business opportunities.

•Identify new market opportunities, platforms, and trends to support business growth.

•Perform other sales, marketing, and business development tasks as assigned.



Department: Marketing

Note: This is an independent contractor position.



Only those applicants who submit their applications on this link will be screened:

title: Content Feedback Manager: $1,000–$1,200 USD Start | Growth to $1,500+
description:
Start rate: $800 a month + performance-based bonuses (TOTAL: $1,000–$1,200 a month)



Paid every two weeks via Wise.



ABOUT US







Young Publisher is an international digital marketing company working with content creators and online brands.



BENEFITS

- Full-time position: 8 hours daily, Monday-Friday; 40 hours a week

- Flexible schedule: Choose your own hours, as long as you show up for the daily meeting (MANDATORY)

- Stable income: Long-term role with regular, on-time payments

- Supportive team: Collaborative environment without micromanagement

- Growth path: Opportunities to increase responsibilities and earnings

- 100% remote: Work-from-home setup



TASKS



Content & Client Feedback



- Review 30-60 short-form client videos (Instagram Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts) per day in our Slack feedback channel -before they are published

- Give constructive, actionable feedback on hooks (verbal/headline/visual), scripting, pacing, editing, and CTA, making sure each client knows exactly how to improve

- Cross-reference each piece of content with client niche, experience, and goals as outlined in their files

- Review previous feedback to ensure consistency and avoid contradictions

- Quality-control content ideas created by our Content Research Experts before delivery to the client, ensuring fit with niche, experience, and likely performance

- Oversee workload balance among Content Research Experts and make sure no one on the team is overloaded or underutilized

- Respond to client questions or tech issues in Slack within 24 hours

- Be tough but fair—only approve content that meets quality standards



Progress Tracking



- Complete daily End-of-Day (EOD) reports

- Attend daily tea
eting (mandatory, 3pm CET)

- Keep internal feedback and client progress records up to date



REQUIREMENTS (MUST-HAVE)

- C1+ English (written), with perfect grammar and clear, professional responses

- Significant experience creating or reviewing short-form content for Instagram Reels, TikTok, or YouTube Shorts

- Organized and detail-oriented

- Reliable internet and a quiet, professional home workspace

- Accountability mindset and deadline commitment

- Long-term commitment, eager to master a workflow and have direct impact on client success



IMPORTANT



- When recording a Loom video as part of your application:

- Camera must show your FACE & SCREEN

- Treat it as a LIVE interview with the Hiring Manager

- Have a professional background

- Have clear audio

- Wear business-casual attire



BONUS SKILLS (NOT REQUIRED)



- Experience supporting creators and social media beginners, especially ages 45+

- Familiarity with AI tools like ChatGPT, CapCut, etc.

- Strong understanding of trends/strategy for Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts



WHY JOIN US?



- Start rate: $800 a month + performance-based bonuses (TOTAL: $1,000–$1,200 a month once trained)

Note: Senior CFMs earn $1,500+ after 6–12 months.

- Performance bonuses: Up to $400+ additional monthly based on:

- Quality and clarity of feedback

- Task completion and consistency

- Teamwork and responsibility

- Payments: Twice per month via Wise, direct to your bank

- Tools access: All tools/software fully covered

- Work-life balance: No graveyard shifts

- Professional growth: Frequent feedback and advanced training



HOW TO APPLY



1: Message us on OnlineJobs.ph with "CFM" as the message title



2: Include ONLY the following in your message:



#1: Your CV.

#2: Your years of experience with short-form content.

#3: Your years of experience with content feedback or coaching.

#4: One sentence on why you're a good fit for this role.

#5: Your portfolio (including examples of your feedback or video/content work).



Note: Messages that do not follow this format will NOT be reviewed.



P.S. Young Publisher is the recruitment company. Successful candidates will work under Social Influence Consulting LLC.

title: SEO Manager
description:
Leapify is looking for an experienced SEO Manager with strong experience leveraging AI in their workflows.



We're looking for someone who understands how to build a modern SEO engine using:

- AI workflows

- Keyword research & content strategy

- On-page & technical SEO optimization

- Answer Engine Optimization (AEO)

- Generative Engine Optimization (GEO)

- Link building & authority development

- Data-driven performance monitoring and iteration



You should know how to generate consistent organic traffic growth while staying ahead of how AI is reshaping search.



---



About Leapify



Leapify is an AI platform that helps service businesses automate missed calls, lead follow-ups, bookings, reviews, invoicing, and customer communication.



We work with industries like:

- Home services

- Automotive

- Med spas

- Real estate

- Service-based businesses



Our goal is to help businesses operate faster and more efficiently using AI.



---



What You'll Be Doing



Build and manage our organic search presence by:

- Using AI to speed up keyword research, topic clustering, and competitive analysis

- Creating SEO briefs and overseeing content production with AI assistance

- Optimizing existing pages for rankings, search intent, and conversion

- Editing and refining AI-generated content to ensure quality and brand voice

- Building backlink strategy and growing domain authority



Handle technical SEO:

- Site audits and crawlability improvements

- Schema markup and structured data

- Core Web Vitals and page speed optimization

- Internal linking and site architecture



Stay ahead of AI search trends:

- Optimize content for Google AI Overviews, ChatGPT, Perplexity, and other AI answer engines

- Structure content in Q&A and entity-based formats for AI consumption

- Monitor brand visibility across both traditional and AI-powered search



Track and report on performance:

- Organic traffic, rankings, and keyword movement

- AI Overview appearances and share of voice

- Backlink profile growth and content ROI



Work directly with the founders on SEO and content strategy.



---



Requirements



- Proven SEO experience with a strong track record of growing organic traffic

- Actively uses AI to do more — whether that's research, content creation, audits, or reporting

- Solid understanding of on-page, off-page, and technical SEO fundamentals

- Familiarity with optimizing for AI search — AEO, AI Overviews, and LLM visibility

- Ability to write, edit, and improve AI-generated content so it reads naturally and ranks well

- Strong English writing and communication skills

- Analytical mindset — comfortable pulling insights from Google Search Console, GA4, and SEO platforms

title: Remote Retail Accountant (Full-Time) — Cannabis Industry | QuickBooks & Excel
description:
Type: Full-time, long-term



Schedule: Full U.S. Pacific Time (PST) overlap during onboarding and training. Once fully proficient, schedule transitions to part-time PST overlap with flexibility on the remaining hours.



Location: Remote (Philippines)



About the Role

We're a U.S.-based cannabis retailer looking for a detail-oriented accountant to handle our day-to-day books across multiple entities. You'll own reconciliations, accruals, inventory entries, sales tax, and monthly reporting. We're not looking for a rubber-stamper — we want someone who notices when something is off, asks the right questions, and keeps the books genuinely clean. Training will be provided for U.S.-specific items like income tax accruals and cannabis-specific accounting nuances.



Note: The cannabis industry has unique tax and compliance considerations (including IRC 280E). No prior cannabis experience required — we'll train you — but you should be comfortable working in a regulated industry.



What You'll Do:



Perform bank and cash reconciliations, including intercompany transfers

Maintain prepaid expense and insurance amortization schedules

Manage accruals for payroll taxes, tips, and sales tax liabilities

Prepare monthly financial reporting packages

Handle intercompany invoicing, allocate split expenses, and balance collaboratively with tea
mbers

Record inventory additions, shrinkage, and COGS adjustments based on POS data

Reconcile and record sales from multiple payment methods (cash, card, debit, ACH, etc.)

Prepare sales tax filings and provide audit support

Calculate, accrue, and process income tax payments (specific training provided)



What You Need:



1+ years of accounting experience

Working proficiency in QuickBooks

Solid Excel skills: SUMIF, VLOOKUP/XLOOKUP, pivot tables, conditional formatting

Strong grasp of accrual accounting and reconciliations

Excellent written English and proactive communication

Ability to work full PST hours during the training period

Reliable internet, backup power, and a quiet workspace



Nice to Have:



Experience working with U.S. retail clients or businesses

Familiarity with U.S. sales tax filings (multi-state a plus)

Experience with POS systems (especially cannabis POS like Dutchie, Treez, Flowhub, or general retail POS)

Comfort working in a cash-heavy business environment

CPA, CMA, or accounting degree



How to Apply:

Please start your application with the word "RECONCILED" so we know you read the full post.

In your message, include:



1. A brief introduction and summary of your relevant accounting experience — written in your own words

2. The QuickBooks version(s) and POS systems you've worked with

3. Your monthly salary expectation within the range

4. Your available start date and confirmation that you can work full PST hours during training

5. Answer this question in 2–3 sentences: What is the most challenging reconciliation you've personally completed, and what made it difficult?

6. Record a 60–90 second unedited video of yourself introducing your accounting background and walking through one Excel formula you use often. Upload to Google Drive, Loom, or YouTube (unlisted) and share the link.



Applications without the keyword, the personal answer, and the video will not be reviewed.

title: Solutions Architect (AI-assisted)
description:
We're a small US-based team building software for the cannabis industry.



We're looking for a Solutions Architect who can take product ideas, workflows, and rough specifications and translate them into clear technical designs and well-structured implementations. This role sits between product thinking and engineering execution.



You'll work within our existing architecture, patterns, and plugin/template system. You'll help define how features should be built, guide developers working from specs, and implement complex pieces when needed.



We rely heavily on AI-assisted development workflows, so comfort using AI tools to accelerate design, coding, and debugging is important.



Strong communication, system thinking, and the ability to break complex ideas into clear steps matter more than formal titles.



What we need:

Reliable internet and 2–4 hours overlap with Pacific Time

Clear written and spoken English for technical discussions and documentation

Ability to design systems that fit existing architecture and patterns

Strong problem-solving and debugging skills

Comfort learning and adopting AI-assisted development tools

Ability to communicate technical ideas clearly to developers



What you'll do:

Design technical solutions from product ideas, workflows, or rough specs

Translate requirements into clear architecture and implementation plans

Build complex features, integrations, and internal tools

Guide developers working from your specs or designs

Review pull requests and provide architectural feedback

Improve internal development workflows and tooling

Use AI tools to accelerate development, testing, and documentation



How we work:

Async-first, with occasional sync when needed

PR-based workflow (GitHub pull requests)

Small, incremental iterations over large rewrites

AI-assisted development is part of the daily workflow

Paid trial (3–6 hours) before longer engagement



Interested? Send a short intro, GitHub or portfolio link (if you have one), and answers to:

1. Why does this role appeal to you?

2. Describe a system or feature you designed and implemented.

3. Describe a time you had to quickly learn a new technology or architecture pattern.

title: Social Media Video Editor (Short-Form Content | Personal Brand Growth)
description:
**Overview:**

I’m building a personal brand alongside a fast-growing media company. I’m looking for a highly skilled video editor who understands how to turn raw footage into engaging, high-retention content for platforms like TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts.



This is not just about editing—it’s about storytelling, pacing, and knowing what makes people stop scrolling.



---

**What You’ll Do:**



* Edit short-form videos (15–60 seconds) optimized for TikTok, Reels, and Shorts

* Add captions, motion graphics, zooms, cuts, and sound effects to increase retention

* Identify and highlight the most engaging 
nts from raw footage

* Follow current trends while helping develop a unique, recognizable style

* Repurpose long-form content into multiple short clips

* Deliver content consistently and on time

---



**What I’m Looking For:**



* Strong portfolio of **short-form/social media content** (this is required)

* Deep understanding of pacing, hooks, and viewer retention

* Experience editing for creators, brands, or media companies

* Ability to add engaging captions and visual storytelling elements

* Awareness of TikTok/YouTube trends and what performs well

* Strong communication and ability to take feedback

---



**Bonus (Huge Plus):**



* Experience growing accounts through content

* Understanding of analytics (watch time, retention, etc.)

* Creative input on content ideas and direction

* Experience with children’s or family-friendly content

---

**Tools (Preferred, not required):**

* Adobe Premiere Pro / After Effects

* CapCut / Final Cut Pro



**Project Details:**



* Ongoing work (not a one-time project)

* Volume: 5 short videos per week

* Turnaround time: 24–72 hours

* Budget: Open for the right talent



-

title: Full-Stack React + Salesforce Developer (Contract ? Full-Time) — Fintech / Private Lending
description:
Australian non-bank private lender. We fund residential and commercial loans through warehouse trusts and run an in-house technology platform built on React, Supabase, and Salesforce (Financial Services Cloud + Finspectra).

Engagement: Starts as a contractor (remote, AU business hours overlap preferred). Strong performers transition to a full-time role within 3–6 months.



What you'll do

You'll join a small, fast-moving build led by our MD. You'll own real features end-to-end across a suite of internal apps — a credit workbench, sales CRM, broker portal, executive dashboards, and a public website. Day one priorities:



Diagnose and fix Salesforce ? Supabase sync issues (Finspectra fsCore__ objects, lending applications, customers, collateral, decisions, checklists)

Extend existing React apps — new features, polish, performance, bug fixes

Build new modules within the monorepo following our established patterns

Wire up integrations (Microsoft Graph / SharePoint, Salesforce REST/Bulk APIs, Azure Document Intelligence)



Must-have skills



3+ years React (hooks, state management, component architecture). We use React 18 + Vite, inline styles with shared design tokens, no Tailwind, no router — state-based nav

Strong PostgreSQL and Supabase experience — RLS policies, migrations, PostgREST, JSONB columns, auth (Azure AD OAuth + MFA aal2)

Salesforce integration experience — REST API, SOQL, Flow, Financial Services Cloud or any managed package (Finspectra a big plus)

Comfortable reading and extending a codebase of 2,000–3,000 line files without breaking things

Excellent written English — you'll work async with the MD via PRs and chat



Nice to have



Netlify Functions, Puppeteer / headless Chromium for PDF generation

Microsoft Graph API, SharePoint document storage

Australian financial services or private credit domain knowledge

Experience with Salesforce Flow, round-robin assignment, lead triage



What we offer



Competitive contractor rate (PHP, paid weekly or fortnightly via Wise / direct deposit)

Clear path to full-time employment.

Real ownership — you'll see your code in production within days, not months

Direct line to the MD, no middle management



To apply

Send: (1) GitHub or portfolio link, (2) one paragraph on a Salesforce or Supabase integration you debugged or built, (3) your contractor day rate in PHP or USD. Shortlisted candidates will complete a short TestGorilla assessment.

You'll Need:

Ability to troubleshoot and optimise systems independently without being told what to fix

What We Offer:

title: Customer Service Representative
description:
You will be the first point of contact for our enrolled credit repair clients. Your job is to make sure every client is in good standing — active in our Skool membership, enrolled in credit monitoring, and receiving their monthly dispute rounds on time. When something is off, you reach out and fix it.



You will work inside Go HighLevel (GHL) and use the built-in web dialer to call and text clients from our US business number — no physical US phone needed. You will also check DisputeFox daily to audit client status and Skool to verify membership activity.



Daily responsibilities

1

Run the daily client audit

Pull the client list from DisputeFox. Cross-check every client against the Skool Success Academy roster. Flag anyone whose Skool membership has lapsed, whose credit monitoring is inactive, or whose dispute round is 30+ days overdue.



2

Reach out to flagged clients

Contact clients via text first, then call if no response within 24 hours. Follow our scripts for each situation: lapsed membership, inactive monitoring, or overdue dispute round. Log every attempt — no interaction goes unrecorded.



3

Manage the GHL CRM pipeline

After every interaction, update the client's contact record in Go HighLevel — move them to the correct pipeline stage, add contact notes, log the outcome, and set a follow-up task if needed. Keep the CRM clean and accurate at all times.



4

Escalate and report

After 3 failed contact attempts, escalate to the owner. Each day, send a brief end-of-day summary: clients reviewed, issues resolved, clients still open, anything that needs owner attention



Tools you'll use



DisputeFox

Credit repair platform — daily client audit and status checks



Skool

Membership platform — verify clients are active in Success Academy



GHL Web Dialer

Make calls and send SMS to US clients from your browser



Requirements



Excellent English — clear written and spoken communication with US clients (this is a client-facing role)



Strong attention to detail and follow-through — nothing falls through the cracks in this role



Comfortable making calls and sending texts to US clients through a browser-based dialer



Experience with CRM platforms or client management tools



Reliable internet connection and availability during US business hours (Central Time preferred)



Ability to follow documented scripts and processes consistently



Trustworthy with sensitive client information — our clients' personal and financial data is confidential

Nice to have (not required)



Experience with Go HighLevel — pipelines, conversations tab, contact notes, workflows



Background in credit repair, financial services, or coaching/membership businesses



Previous experience supporting US-based clients remotely



Familiarity with DisputeFox or similar credit dispute platforms



 Setup

This is a long-term remote role paid in USD. You will be added to our Go HighLevel account as a tea
mber with access to only the tools you need — no billing access, no agency settings. You work directly with the business owner and one small internal team. We value reliability, communication, and people who take ownership of their work. If that's you, we'd love to talk.

title: Experienced Associate Brand Manager to support 12+ Amazon brands for growth, execution, drive performance and operation
description:
Role Overview



We're hiring 2 Associate Brand Manager who will work directly under the Senior Brand Manager to execute day-to-day brand operations. This is a hands-on role focused on the “legwork” that drives performance: optimizing listings, managing keyword research, coordinating creative projects, and pulling actionable data.



If the Senior Brand Manager sets the playbook, the Associate Brand Manager runs the plays — ensuring everything gets executed on time, correctly, and at a high level.



Key Responsibilities

1. Listing Management & Optimization

Create, update, and fully optimize Amazon product listings (titles, bullets, descriptions, images, videos, A+ content).

Conduct keyword research and competitor analysis to improve rankings and visibility.

Ensure all listings remain Rufus and Cosmos compliant with Amazon’s latest requirements.

Test content variations (A/B testing) to improve CTR and conversions.



2. Data Research & Analysis

Pull performance data from Amazon Seller Central and external tools (Data Dive, Helium 10, Jungle Scout).

Identify trends, keyword shifts, and competitor activity.

Provide actionable recommendations to the Senior Brand Manager to improve conversions, CTR, and sales velocity.



3. Cross-Team Collaboration

Work closely with the graphic design team to request, coordinate, and deliver images, infographics, and A+ creatives.

Partner with the marketing team to support product launches, promotions, and review-generation initiatives.

Ensure all projects are aligned with deadlines, strategy, and brand guidelines.



4. Conversion-Focused Execution

Continuously update and refine listings to improve conversion rates and customer engagement.

Maintain Amazon Brand Stores, A+ content, and ad creatives for consistency and performance.

Assist in preparing assets for influencer campaigns and external marketing pushes.



5. Project & Compliance Support

Own the administrative “heavy lifting” of flat files, bulk uploads, and catalog troubleshooting.

Flag compliance issues, unauthorized sellers, or listing errors for quick resolution.

Support market expansion efforts by preparing research and draft listings for new product opportunities.



Skills & Qualifications



2+ years experience in Amazon FBA operations, brand management, or digital marketing.

Proficient in Amazon Seller Central, flat files, listing creation, and troubleshooting.

Strong skills in SEO, keyword research, and listing optimization.

Data-driven mindset; confident in Google Sheets and reporting.

Strong communication skills to work cross-functionally with design, marketing, and operations teams.

Highly organized, detail-oriented, and capable of managing multiple deadlines.



What Success Looks Like

Every listing across assigned brands is fully optimized, compliant, and performing.

Senior Brand Manager receives clear, accurate reports and recommendations.

Creative assets are delivered on time because you coordinated smoothly with design.



Product launches happen seamlessly with marketing and review strategies in place.

Conversions and rankings consistently improve due to your execution. If you feel you are the right fit, please respond to the job with the title " The Best Supporting Branding Manager Out There!"



Please respond directly to :

----------



Kind Regards,

Tam Ma

Co Founder

Prodigy Media

title: AI-Forward Bookkeeper
description:
The Role

We are looking for a tech-savvy, detail-oriented Bookkeeper who doesn't just do things "the old way." You will be responsible for managing our core financial records, but with a significant twist: you should be comfortable leveraging AI tools and database matching to streamline our reconciliations and reporting.



If you are a QuickBooks expert who loves finding ways to automate manual workflows, we want to talk to you.



Key Responsibilities

Full-Cycle Bookkeeping: Perform regular bank and credit card reconciliations with 100% accuracy.

QuickBooks Management: Post entries, manage accounts payable/receivable, and ensure the general ledger is audit-ready.

AI Integration: Use AI tools (e.g., ChatGPT, specialized accounting AI, or automated OCR) to categorize transactions and summarize financial data.

Database Matching: Use databases or advanced spreadsheet functions to match high-volume transactional data against bank statements.

Process Optimization: Identify manual bottlenecks and implement automated solutions to speed up the monthly close.



Required Skills & Qualifications

QuickBooks Mastery: Deep experience with QuickBooks Online or Desktop.

AI Literacy: Proven ability to use AI tools to increase productivity and data accuracy.

Data Savvy: Strong understanding of how to work with databases (SQL knowledge is a plus) and advanced Excel/Google Sheets.

Reconciliation Expert: You should be able to spot a $0.01 discrepancy in a sea of thousands of lines.

Self-Starter: Since this is an urgent hire, you must be able to hit the ground running with minimal hand-holding.



***Very important: Do take note that the applicant is required to share their updated CV with appropriate access. Applicants who are non compliant with this will be automatically ignored.***

title: Social Media Content Creator
description:
I AM Studios is an Event hall that also does photo booths. We are looking for a self-starter Social Media Content Creator. We need someone who is attentive to DETAIL and can follow instructions, learn quickly, and is dedicated for the long term. 



YOU MUST KNOW THE LASTEST TRENDS AND HOW TO ATTRACT CUSTOMERS WITH CONTENT. 



Position Overview:

We are seeking a creative, trend-savvy, and results-driven Social Media Content Creator to transform our existing photos, videos, and camera footage into eye-catching, engaging content for our event hall brand. This role is ideal for someone who understands how to create attractive social media posts that capture attention, grow followers, and drive bookings.



Key Responsibilities:



Create 3 high-quality social media posts per day

Produce at least 1 video post or reel daily

Edit and enhance provided photos and video footage into professional content

Design engaging, attractive visuals that align with our brand

Stay current with the latest social media trends, sounds, formats, and viral content ideas

Create trend-based content that increases visibility and audience engagement

Develop and maintain a monthly content calendar specifically for our event hall

Plan content around seasons, holidays, weddings, birthdays, corporate events, graduations, and special occasions

Create content focused on increasing followers, inquiries, and bookings

Maintain a consistent and polished brand presence across platforms



Qualifications:



Proven experience creating content for social media platforms such as Instagram,
, TikTok, or similar

Strong photo editing and video editing skills

Understanding of current social media trends and how to apply them to business marketing

Experience building content calendars and promotional campaigns

Ability to create visually appealing and engaging content

Understanding of strategies that help grow followers and increase bookings

Strong creativity, organization, and attention to detail

Ability to meet daily content deadlines consistently



Scope of Work:

This position is focused on content creation and planning only. Posting and account management are not required at this time.



Ideal Candidate:

Someone who can take raw content and turn it into compelling posts that attract attention, build our audience, and convert viewers into paying customers while keeping our event hall relevant with fresh, trending content year-round.



REQUIREMENTS

-Excellent verbal and written English who has experience with Canva,  Instagram,
 and 

-MUST BE ABLE TO DO REELS, VIDEOS, ADS

- Proven work experience as a Social Media Manager or relevant experience;

- A solid understanding of social media marketing for business and trends;

-Must have sample articles for previous work, and reviews, to consider. 

-Must know how to Schedule content out and post it to all our accounts. 3 posts a day

-Must be able to meet once a week to come up with the week's plan.

-Must post in Eastern Time Zone





How to Apply

1. Reply to this job posting and on the subject of the
, write “I AM  247 Social Media Content Creator" and attach your Resume.

2. In the body, write a short paragraph about your experience with social media, and based on the job description above, why you think you would be a good fit for this role.

3. Send me proven work Experience

4. After review, if I look at your work, I will send you a draft of photo and video and ask you to create 3 post for your interview. 





Please do not apply if you have no prior experience in social media.

Please do not apply if you have internet issues or do not own a computer

title: Social Media Influencer Creator UGC Sourcing
description:
We are looking for support with sourcing video creators on TikTok. We are looking for young, social media savvy, ambitious individuals to join our team. In order to apply for this role you need to complete two tasks.



1. Send a Loom or Video to my WhatsApp introducing yourself and why you would be good at this role.

2. Complete the below task to prove your ability.



TASK 



ABOUT THE APP

Lockt is an app that locks distracting apps and screen time until the user hits their daily step count.

The content angle is phone addiction, frustration, self-awareness, walking, and a
 self-improvement.



We mainly want creators / people who can film short iPhone videos for us.

In most cases, we post the videos from our own accounts, we are not looking for influencers with large followings, the opposite, we need low cost UGC video creators.



THE TASK

Build a small first-pass talent list for Lockt.



We do NOT want you to only find obvious UGC creators. Think wider.



We're interested in 2 buckets:



1. people already making content who are strong on camera

2. normal students / young people on TikTok or Instagram who may be cheap, teachable, and naturally good for this



Please submit:



PART 1 — 10 creator / talent leads



For each lead include:

1. name or handle

2. platform

3. profile link

4. which bucket they belong to:

   - existing UGC / creator

   - normal student / non-obvious talent

5. why they fit Lockt in 1-2 sentences

6. whether they seem:

   - good on camera

   - articulate

   - cheap enough to test

7. your estimated price bucket:

   - under $15

   - under $20

   - probably above $20

8. which Lockt hook angle they match best

9. whether they are better for:

   - raw-file UGC for our own channels

   - creator-posting deal on their own channel

   - both



PART 2 — your top 3 picks

From the 10, choose your top 3 and explain:

- why they are the strongest

- which one is the cheapest scalable option

- which one is the best pure on-camera talent

- which one is the best "non-obvious" pick



PART 3 — outreach

Write 5 short outreach messages to 5 of your chosen leads. (You don't have to actually send them, just draft them.)

They should feel specific, natural, and not spammy.



PART 4 — teaching angle

Pick 2 of your leads who are not polished UGC people.

Write 3-5 bullet points on how you would teach them to make good Lockt videos if they said yes.



FORMAT

Put everything into one Google Doc or PDF and send it to my WhatsApp

title: Sales Development Manager

title: Technical Sales Engineer - Laboratory Materials and Equipment
description:
MSE Supplies LLC is seeking a highly driven Technical Sales Specialist to lead and expand our Materials Science and Life Sciences teams. This role will represent consumables such as Engineered Ceramics, Crystals and general lab supplies including but not limited to; tissue culture, liquid handling, cold storage, blood collection, microscopy, histology, PCR/qPCR and others. In addition, the product portfolio will offer a full capital expenditure equipment portfolio including arc melters, melt spinners, coating equipment & PVD systems. 



This role is designed for a business-oriented professional who is passionate about bridging scientific innovation with commercial success and working in fast moving team environment. As a key member of the sales team, you will influence the direction of our product strategy, drive sales growth, and support global customers in achieving breakthrough research outcomes and be well compensated for all responsibilities. 



Responsibilities

•	Execute strategic territory and sales plans, actively managing a robust pipeline and maintain accurate opportunity tracking within CRM systems to support forecasting and consistently achieve or exceed revenue targets 

•	Own commercial performance for a defined portfolio of laboratory products, driving revenue growth, margin expansion, and market penetration 

•	Serve as the technical sales expert for assigned product lines (e.g., advanced materials, chemicals, lab equipment, instrumentation), aligning solutions to customer applications 

•	Drive consultative, solution-based sales, positioning MSE Supplies as a preferred partner for both standard and customized solutions 

•	Develop and expand key customer relationships, engaging decision-makers to identify opportunities, negotiate agreements, and grow share of wallet 

•	Proactively manage inbound and outbound sales opportunities, converting qualified leads into revenue through structured follow-up and closing strategies 

•	Deliver high-impact technical presentations, product demonstrations, and application-driven discussions to accelerate customer decision-making 

•	Provide pre-sales technical support and commercial guidance, ensuring alignment between customer needs and product capabilities to drive conversion and retention 

•	Collaborate cross-functionally with Sales, Marketing, Product Management, and Operations to align go-to-market strategy and execution 

•	Act as the voice of the customer, capturing market insights, competitive intelligence, and unmet needs to inform product development and commercial strategy 



Qualifications and Skills



•	Bachelor’s degree in Chemistry, Materials Science, Biology, Chemical Engineering, or a related technical field required; equivalent industry experience with a proven track record of sales success in scientific markets may be considered in lieu of a degree

•	3+ years of experience in technical sales, applications, or customer-facing roles within scientific markets 

•	Demonstrated success in achieving sales targets and managing a pipeline within life sciences, advanced materials, semiconductor, energy, or industrial R&D markets 

•	Strong understanding of laboratory products, workflows, and customer applications 

•	Proven ability to translate technical expertise into commercial value through consultative selling 

•	Experience using CRM platforms (e.g., Salesforce) for pipeline management, forecasting, and activity tracking 

•	Excellent communication, presentation, and negotiation skills with the ability to engage both technical and business stakeholders 

•	Strong organizational and territory management skills, with the ability to manage multiple opportunities simultaneously 

•	Results-driven, self-motivated, and capable of operating effectively in a field-based or hybrid sales environment 



Benefits:

• PTO (Paid Time Off) & Sick Time



Come join us to enable innovations for scientists and engineers worldwide. In this position, you will play a key role in working directly with our large customers base and helping customers purchase the products they need to Enable Innovation. MSE Supplies LLC has built a winning track record of ~100% annual growth rate over the past 5 years. Our company is on a path to accelerated growth. Along the way we will all have a lot of fun celebrating successes together. Come join us!



Company Overview



Trusted by research labs and innovative companies worldwide, MSE Supplies LLC is a U.S.-based leading supplier of high-quality materials, lab equipment, materials characterization analytical services and customized solutions for both research and production. With a global customer base of more than 2,000 research universities, government labs, as well as Fortune 500 companies and technology start-ups, we support scientists and engineers worldwide to accelerate their innovations. As a fast-growing company, we are constantly looking for talented and ambitious people to join our team and develop your successful career.



Our Products and Services (Both Standard and Customized)

• (A to Z) Single Crystals, Wafers and Substrates

• Arc Melting, Melt Spinning and Quenching Equipment (made in Germany by Edmund Buhler)

• Ball Milling Equipment and Accessories (mills, jars, grinding balls, milling media and microbeads)

• Biotech Lab Supplies

• Conductive Oxide (FTO, ITO, AZO) Substrates

• Customized Sputtering Targets

• FAST / SPS / DCS Sintering Presses (made in Germany by Dr. Fritsch)

• Gallium Nitride (GaN) and Silicon Carbide (SiC) compound semiconductor substrates and wafers

• High Purity Inorganic Chemicals

• High Purity Lab Crucibles

• Lithium Battery Materials and Tools (solid electrolytes, anodes, cathodes, battery research consumables and tools)

• Materials Characterization Analytical Services

• Metal Powders for Additive Manufacturing (3D printing)

• Monolayer Graphene Films and Graphene Oxide

• Shakers and Lab Equipment (made in Germany by Edmund Buhler)

• Sintering Furnaces (muffle furnaces, tube furnaces, etc.)

• Pellet Pressing Dies and Presses

• and more...

title: Affiliate Manager
description:
Job Description:



Full-Time | Work From Home | Ecommerce & Influencer Partnerships



SRI Labs is a fast-growing, premium beauty & wellness ecommerce brand known for high-end skincare, hair tools, and breakthrough consumer products. We’re looking for a driven, organized, and relationship-focused Affiliate Manager to lead and scale our affiliate program across platforms like ShopMy, Levanta, and key influencer networks.



If you love partnering with creators, optimizing affiliate performance, and helping a brand grow through relationships — this is the role for you.



What You’ll Do



As our Affiliate Manager, you will own the entire affiliate ecosystem and work directly with the CEO and marketing leadership team to scale creator-led revenue.



Key Responsibilities



Manage and optimize SRI Labs’ affiliate program across ShopMy, Levanta, and other affiliate platforms.

Recruit, vet, and onboard new affiliates, creators, and influencers that align with our brand.

Build strong long-term relationships with partners to drive consistent revenue and brand growth.

Track performance, payouts, ROI, and ensure all affiliates are supported with assets, codes, and campaigns.

Coordinate affiliate-driven launches, seasonal promotions, and strategic campaigns.

Identify top performers and build incentive strategies to maximize their output.

Maintain reporting dashboards and communicate results to leadership weekly.

Collaborate with internal marketing, product, design, and operations teams to support affiliate needs.

Continuously test new platforms, creators, strategies, and incentives to grow revenue.

Who You Are



We’re looking for someone who is:



Based in the Philippines

Experienced in affiliate, influencer marketing, or digital partnerships (1–3+ years preferred).

Organized, reliable, and able to manage many creators and campaigns at once.

Strong at relationship-building — someone affiliates love to work with.

Comfortable working within platforms like ShopMy, Levanta, Impact, or similar tools.

Data-driven with excellent follow-through and communication skills.

Hungry, proactive, and passionate about helping a brand grow.

Why Join SRI Labs?



Remote work

Work directly with a high-performing founding team

Competitive salary based on experience

Long-term growth potential within a fast-scaling ecommerce company

Supportive, positive culture built around speed, innovation, and passion for great products

Opportunity to make a big impact — your work will directly drive revenue and brand expansion

How to Apply



 your resume and a quick 2–3 sentence introduction 



Subject Line: Affiliate Manager – [Your Name]



Include:



Links to affiliate programs or creators you’ve worked with

Any relevant platforms/tools you’ve used

Your expected monthly salary (in PHP)

Job Type: Full-time

This role is key to delivering high-converting campaigns that drive customer engagement, retention, and revenue across our skincare and hair care product lines. title: Casual Web Designer & SEO Specialist (Framer / WordPress) – Luxury Brands Focus
